reviews.author: TheHammer Silver

reviews.text:
Warning: Price Doubling & Intense Pressure

We agreed on a fixed price for an excursion, which was later doubled without our consent.

When we refused to accept the new price, we were subjected to intense pressure and threatened with police action and potential deportation.

On the last day of our vacation, we were forced to spend the entire day at the police station. Under intense time pressure, we ultimately paid 7,000 rupees to secure our departure.

Excursions booked through the hotel were slightly more expensive, but professional and transparent.

We strongly recommend exercising caution with this provider and only agreeing to prices in writing.
reviews.originalText:
Warnung: Preisverdopplung & starker Druck

Wir hatten uns auf einen festen Preis für einen Ausflug geeinigt, der später ohne Zustimmung verdoppelt wurde.
Als wir den neuen Preis nicht akzeptierten, erhielten wir massiven Druck und es wurde mit Polizeischritten und möglicher Ausreiseverhinderung gedroht.
Am letzten Urlaubstag mussten wir den ganzen Tag auf der Polizeistation verbringen. Unter starkem Zeitdruck haben wir schließlich 7.000 Rupien bezahlt, um unseren Abflug zu sichern.
Hotelgebuchte Ausflüge waren etwas teurer, aber professionell und transparent.
Wir empfehlen, bei diesem Anbieter sehr vorsichtig zu sein und Preise nur schriftlich zu vereinbaren.
reviews.author: Helen

reviews.title: Warning: Price doubling, massive pressure & police intimidation
reviews.text:
We would like to strongly warn other travelers and share our experience with Belle Mare Tours.
We had verbally agreed on a fixed price. Subsequently, this price was doubled without our consent. We did not accept this new price and did not pay it.

An extremely stressful situation then began:
Threatened to press charges and prevent us from leaving. On the last day of our holiday we had to spend the whole day at the police station (twice there), which was very stressful and scary for us.
The police eventually accompanied us to Belle Mare Tours for safety reasons, as we were afraid to go there alone.

On the spot we paid 3,500 rupees, the policeman was present and confirmed that we acted correctly. Shortly afterwards, this money was returned to us by Belle Mare Tours – also in the presence of the police who witnessed it.

We were subsequently told to go back to the hotel and stay calm.
Later, however, we received another call telling us that a complaint had now been made and that our departure could be at risk. We were advised to pay 7,000 rupees to avoid problems at the airport.

Since our departure the next morning was very early and we were under severe time pressure, we paid this money out of fear and to avoid further escalation.

Additionally, we and our hotel were contacted several times by phone, which we found very stressful and intimidating.

We have WhatsApp messages and receipts showing that we were willing to pay the originally agreed price.

We also found it striking and disturbing that information about our case seemed to spread very quickly – even people we had no previous contact with already knew about it. We cannot assess how this came about, but we would like to mention it, as it has significantly increased our sense of uncertainty.
For comparison:

Another excursion we booked through our hotel. This one was 1,000 rupees more expensive, but highly professional, transparent and we saw much more. This shows that there are very serious and fair suppliers in Mauritius.
Conclusion:

This experience has put a lot of strain on our holiday. We strongly recommend that you be extremely careful with this provider and only record prices in writing – or better to book directly through the hotel or established agencies.
reviews.author: Quest23396814780

ownerResponse.text:
Dear Valued Guest,
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We take all customer concerns seriously and would like to address the points raised in your review.
Regarding Pricing Transparency:
We sincerely regret any confusion regarding the pricing structure. Our activity list, which was provided to you at the time of booking, clearly indicates that all prices are per person. The excursion you participated in included both the Swimming with Dolphins experience and the South Tour, which is priced at MUR 3,500 per person as stated in our documentation.
For clarity:

Standard South Tour (without dolphins): MUR 3,500 per person
Swimming with Dolphins + South Tour: MUR 3,500 per person (as per the activity undertaken)

We understand there may have been a misunderstanding during the verbal discussion, and we acknowledge that clearer communication at the outset could have prevented this situation.
Regarding Payment and Follow-up:
Following the completion of your excursion, we made several attempts to contact you regarding the outstanding payment. Our intention was simply to arrange settlement for services rendered. We requested that you visit our office to discuss the matter, which is standard procedure.
We deeply regret that the situation escalated to the point where police involvement became necessary. When the matter was explained to the authorities, they reviewed the documentation and confirmed that payment for services provided was appropriate.
Our Commitment Moving Forward:
While we maintain that our pricing was clearly communicated in writing, we recognize that this experience was stressful for you, and for that we are truly sorry. We are committed to ensuring that all future bookings include:

Written confirmation of all prices and services
Clear breakdown of per-person versus total costs
Email confirmation prior to service delivery

We value customer satisfaction above all else and regret that your holiday experience was negatively impacted. We hope you can appreciate that we were simply seeking fair payment for services delivered, but we acknowledge that the situation could have been handled with greater sensitivity.
Should you wish to discuss this matter further, please feel free to contact us directly.
We hope that despite this unfortunate incident, you have positive memories of Mauritius.
Respectfully,
Belle Mare Tours Management

reviews.author: Grigny Laurie

reviews.text:
Unfortunately, I can't give it a higher rating. We feel cheated. Contact was difficult after the first time, and the person on the first number listed on the website responded very rarely and curtly. It was only after calling the second number that we were able to communicate.

According to the website description, the cruise was supposed to depart at around 7:30 AM, but the person on the phone stated we were leaving at 8:30 AM. The website states to arrive 15 minutes early. We arrived at 8:15 AM. At 8:30 AM, they hadn't even started boarding yet. We departed at 9:05 AM. We were attached to the Coral Belle catamaran.
The itinerary was supposed to include three stops: Flat Island, Gabriel Island, and snorkeling at Coin de Mire. The trip involved sailing to Gabriel Island, spending about two hours there, and that was it. That's a whole trip for a whopping 2500 MUR! What snorkeling? What reefs? There's no reef at Gabriel Island! Yes, there are a few fish, but this wasn't how it was supposed to be! After two hours on the beach and in the water, we returned to the catamaran for a meal. Lunch was okay, but dessert? The offer included fruit salad and a flamingo banana. We got... attention... 1 slice of pineapple!!! 1 slice of pineapple... Seriously? After lunch, instead of heading to a snorkeling spot, there was loud music and some completely unnecessary dancing. This wasn't how it was supposed to be. We're very disappointed because we were hoping for some great snorkeling on the reefs and to land on two islands, as described. Disappointing! I don't recommend it!
reviews.originalText:
Niestety, nie mogę dać wyższej oceny. Czujemy się oszukani. Po 1 kontakt utrudniony, na 1 numer podany na stronie człowiek bardzo rzadko i lakonicznie odpisywał. Dopiero po kontakcie z drugim numerem dało się porozumieć.
Wg opisu na stronie rejs miał być ok. 7:30, pan przez telefon napisał, że wypływamy 8:30. Na stronie podane jest, żeby być 15 minut wcześniej. Byliśmy o 8:15. O 8:30 jeszcze nawet nie zaczęli wpuszczać na pokład. Wypłynęliśmy o 9:05. Byliśmy doklejeni do katamaranu Coral Belle.
W planie miały być 3 punkty: Flat Island, Gabriel Island oraz snorkeling przy Coin de Mire. Wycieczka wyglądała tak, że popłynęliśmy na Gabriel Island, tam mieliśmy ok. 2h i tyle. To cała wycieczka za całe 2500 MUR! Jaki snorkeling? Jakie rafy? Przy Gabriel Island nie ma rafy! Owszem, są nieliczne rybki, ale nie tak miało to wyglądać! Po 2h na plaży i w wodzie wróciliśmy na katamaran, żeby zjeść posiłek. Obiad był w porządku, ale deser? W ofercie była sałatka owocowa i flaming banan. Dostaliśmy... uwaga... 1 plasterek ananasa!!! 1 plasterek ananasa... Serio? Po zjedzonym obiedzie, zamiast popłynąć na jakiś punkt ze snorkelingiem była głośna muzyka i jakieś totalnie niepotrzebne tańce. Nie tak to miało wyglądać. Jest nam bardzo przykro, bo liczyliśmy na fajne snurkowanie na rafach i że wysiądziemy na 2 wyspach tak jak było w opisie. Masakra! Nie polecam!

reviews.author: A

reviews.title: Top Tours in Mauritius: Thank you Belle Mare Tours!
reviews.text:
We booked three excursions with Belle Mare Tours during our stay in Mauritius in May 2025. We discovered them through Facebook posts of good tips about Mauritius.

After contacting several suppliers, the prices and activities offered by Belle Mare Tours proved to be the most interesting. The first phone and WhatsApp contact with the boss was immediately excellent: quick answers, clear explanations, and above all great flexibility, which is essential in Mauritius where the weather can change quickly. We told him which excursions we were interested in, and every day before he advised us the best activity to do the next day depending on the weather forecast in each region of the island.

We did:

The North of the island (Citadel, Port Louis and its market, Jardin de Pamplemousses, Grand Baie and Cap Malheureux), with Kader as driver. Private car just for us, and a perfect day.

- The 5 islands: a great captain, very nice, and we were only 7 passengers on the boat (we both + a group of 5 French). The current went great between us, and the next day Belle Mare Tours put us back together for another excursion, which was really nice! We discovered the 5 islands, the waterfall, and enjoyed a barbecue on Ile aux Cerfs, probably the most beautiful beach we have ever seen. A suspended moment that we will never forget.

- Swim with dolphins (Tamarin / Le Morne side): swim with dolphins, snorkel, barbecue on the beach, and go to Crystal Rock. Unforgettable.

- We also went through Belle Mare Tours to organize a morning shopping, during which Kader took us to Super U of Flacq to shop, buy souvenirs and some small gifts.

Due to lack of time, we were not able to do the 3 North Islands, the excursion in the South, or swim with turtles... but we hope to return to Mauritius to enjoy it fully on a future trip.

Every time we went out, a taxi would pick us up directly from our hotel. Always on time, very nice, and the drivers also act as guides. We had Kader twice, whom we thank again for his kindness, and the boss himself picked us up for one of the outings.

Everything went perfectly well. We recommend Belle Mare Tours with your eyes closed, whether you are a couple, family, friends or solo.

In short, rush, they are the best!

Another huge thank you to the boss, Kader, drivers and captains!
Syrine & Florian
reviews.author: Syrine M

reviews.text:
We booked three excursions with Belle Mare Tours during our stay in Mauritius in May 2025. We discovered them through posts on Facebook groups dedicated to travel tips for Mauritius.

After contacting several providers, Belle Mare Tours' prices and activities proved to be the most appealing. Our initial contact with the owner via phone and WhatsApp was excellent: quick responses, clear explanations, and above all, great flexibility, which is essential in Mauritius where the weather can change rapidly. We told him which excursions interested us, and each evening he advised us on the best activity to do the following day based on the weather forecast for each region of the island.

We did:

- The North of the island (Citadel, Port Louis and its market, Pamplemousses Botanical Garden, Grand Baie, and Cap Malheureux), with Kader as our driver. A private car just for us, and a perfect day.

- The 5 Islands: a fantastic, very friendly captain, and there were only 7 of us on the boat (the two of us plus a group of 5 French people). We got along incredibly well, and the next day Belle Mare Tours booked us together again for another excursion, which was really great! We explored the 5 islands, the waterfall, and enjoyed a barbecue on Île aux Cerfs, undoubtedly the most beautiful beach we've ever seen. A truly unforgettable moment.

- Swimming with dolphins (Tamarin/Le Morne side): swimming with dolphins, snorkeling, a barbecue on the beach, and a visit to Crystal Rock. Unforgettable.

- We also used Belle Mare Tours to organize a morning of shopping, during which Kader took us to the Super U supermarket in Flacq to do our grocery shopping, buy souvenirs, and a few small gifts.

Due to time constraints, we weren't able to visit the three northern islands, take the excursion to the south, or swim with the turtles… but we hope to return to Mauritius to fully enjoy it on a future trip.

For each excursion, a taxi picked us up directly from our hotel. Always on time, very friendly, and the drivers also acted as guides. We had Kader as our guide twice, whom we thank again for his kindness, and the owner himself picked us up for one of the outings.

Everything went perfectly. We wholeheartedly recommend Belle Mare Tours, whether you're a couple, a family, a group of friends, or traveling solo.

In short, go for it, they're the best!

A huge thank you again to the owner, Kader, the drivers, and the captains!

Syrine & Florian
reviews.originalText:
Nous avons réservé trois excursions avec Belle Mare Tours pendant notre séjour à l’île Maurice en mai 2025. Nous les avons découverts grâce à des publications sur des groupes Facebook de bons plans concernant l’île Maurice.

Après avoir contacté plusieurs prestataires, ce sont les prix et les activités proposés par Belle Mare Tours qui se sont révélés les plus intéressants. Le premier contact par téléphone et WhatsApp avec le patron a tout de suite été excellent : réponses rapides, explications claires, et surtout une grande flexibilité, ce qui est essentiel à Maurice où la météo peut changer rapidement. Nous lui avons indiqué les excursions qui nous intéressaient, et chaque veille il nous conseillait la meilleure activité à faire le lendemain selon la météo prévue dans chaque région de l’île.

Nous avons fait :

- Le Nord de l’île (Citadelle, Port-Louis et son marché, Jardin de Pamplemousses, Grand Baie et Cap Malheureux), avec Kader comme chauffeur. Voiture privée rien que pour nous, et une journée parfaite.

- Les 5 îles : un capitaine génial, très sympa, et nous étions seulement 7 passagers sur le bateau (nous deux + un groupe de 5 Français). Le courant est super bien passé entre nous, et le lendemain Belle Mare Tours nous a remis ensemble pour une autre excursion, ce qui était vraiment sympa ! Nous avons découvert les 5 îles, la cascade, et profité d’un barbecue sur l’île aux Cerfs, sans doute la plus belle plage que nous ayons jamais vue. Un moment suspendu que nous n’oublierons jamais.

- Nage avec les dauphins (côté Tamarin / Le Morne) : nager avec les dauphins, snorkeling, barbecue sur la plage, et passage à Crystal Rock. Inoubliable.

- Nous sommes également passés par Belle Mare Tours pour organiser une matinée shopping, durant laquelle Kader nous a  emmenés au Super U de Flacq pour faire nos courses, acheter des souvenirs et quelques petits cadeaux.

Par manque de temps, nous n’avons pas pu faire les 3 îles du Nord, l’excursion dans le Sud, ni la nage avec les tortues… mais nous espérons revenir à l’île Maurice pour en profiter pleinement lors d’un prochain voyage.

À chaque excursion, un taxi venait nous chercher directement à notre hôtel. Toujours à l’heure, très sympa, et les chauffeurs font aussi office de guides. Nous avons eu Kader à deux reprises, que nous remercions encore pour sa gentillesse, et le patron lui-même est venu nous chercher pour l’une des sorties.

Tout s’est parfaitement bien passé. Nous recommandons Belle Mare Tours les yeux fermés, que vous soyez en couple, en famille, entre amis ou en solo.

Bref, foncez, ce sont les meilleurs !

Encore un immense merci au patron, à Kader, aux chauffeurs et aux capitaines !
Syrine & Florian

reviews.text: We took three excursions with this agency and had no complaints. For the south, the weather wasn't great, but the guide offered us alternatives to replace what we couldn't do. reviews.title: Wonderful birthday day in catamaran
reviews.text:
A huge thank you to Roni and his whole team! Thanks to them, I had an amazing 60th birthday day!!! 
Everything was perfect. As soon as we got on the catamaran, the crew was in good care with us. The captain and his second were very friendly, discreet and attentive to us. Ashish offered us delicious cocktails and virgin cocktails. My husband had privatized the boat for six: our sons, daughters-in-law and us. We saw turtles swimming towards the coast. We bathed in the sea as if we were alone in the world and were able to jump into the turquoise water from the catamaran. The captain prepared us a delicious barbecue where quantity and quality were at the rendezvous. Chicken, sausages, fish and lobsters, at an extra cost, accompanied by various salads. The dessert, bananas flaming with rum, was also tasty. 
Then we stopped at Ile aux Cerfs. There were a lot of people at the pier, but as we walked 200 m inside the island, we ended up on an absolutely beautiful wild beach where we swam again.
On the way back, we were approached by a speedboat and there, what a surprise, Roni and the driver who had made our transfer in the morning, brought us the birthday cake and I could blow my candles on board. I loved it!!!
This experience of a perfectly organized day allowed me to garner in my memory wonderful memories. I recommend it to anyone who wants to experience something truly exceptional. 
Many thanks to the whole team!
reviews.author: Isa13116

reviews.title: Do not hesitate to book with them!
reviews.text: Here we are back in France after 8 great days in Mauritius...including 4 days organized by email with a very efficient and accommodating Kavi at Belle MareTours! The guide taxi picked us up from the hotel and served us as a very friendly guide, rates 2 to 4 times cheaper than by the French agency for the same service, everything was perfect. On the other hand, we stayed in Belle Mare, and almost everything is very far by car (1h to 1h30 way!). Two little disappointments during this week: the Turquoise cruise does not allow you to go down to visit the Île aux Aigrettes, it is a separate excursion, and no snorkeling on the Blue Bay site where we have not been! Apart from that, we hardly saw any animals during the hike of the Black River Gorge (nor bathed in a river back as I had read): no bat, no monkeys, parrot glimpse 1 second, some birds, nothing else! On the other hand, all week, great organization of Belle Mare Tours, go there with your eyes closed you will not be disappointed! The opinions are unanimous, it is deserved and that is what made me choose them, like many.
reviews.author: tbeugnon

reviews.text: We're back in France after 8 fantastic days in Mauritius...including 4 days organized by email with the very efficient and accommodating Kavi at Belle MareTours! The taxi-guide picked us up at the hotel and acted as a very friendly guide. The prices were 2 to 4 times cheaper than through the French agency for the same service; everything was perfect. However, we stayed in Belle Mare, and almost everything is quite a drive away (1 to 1.5 hours each way!). Two minor disappointments during this week: the Turquoise cruise doesn't include a visit to Île aux Aigrettes; it's a separate excursion. And there's no snorkeling at Blue Bay, which we didn't get to do! Aside from that, we saw almost no animals during the Black River Gorges hike (nor did we swim in a river on the way back as I had read): no bats, no monkeys, one parrot glimpsed for a second, some birds heard, nothing else! However, Belle Mare Tours provided superb organization throughout the week; go with them without hesitation, you won't be disappointed! The reviews are unanimous, and deservedly so, which is why I, like many others, chose them.
reviews.originalText: Nous voici de retour en France après 8 jours géniaux à l'île Maurice...dont 4 journées organisées par mail avec un  Kavi très efficace et arrangeant chez Belle MareTours ! Le taxi-guide venait nous chercher à l'hôtel et nous servait de très sympathique guide, tarifs 2 à 4 fois moins chers que par l'agence française pour la même prestation, tout fut parfait. Par contre, nous logions à Belle Mare, et tout ou presque est très loin en voiture (1h à 1h30 aller !). Deux petites déceptions pendant cette semaine : la croisière Turquoise ne permet pas de descendre visiter l'île aux Aigrettes, c'est une excursion à part, et pas de snorkeling sur le site de Blue Bay où nous n'avons pas été ! A part cela, nous n'avons quasiment pas vu d'animaux lors de la randonnée des Gorges de la Rivière Noire (ni pris de bain dans une rivière au retour comme j'avais lu) : pas de chauve-souris, pas de singes, 1 perroquet entre-aperçu 1 seconde, des oiseaux entendus, rien d'autre ! Par contre, toute la semaine, super organisation de Belle Mare Tours, allez-y les yeux fermés vous ne serez pas déçu ! Les avis sont unanimes, c'est mérité et c'est ce qui m'a fait les choisir, comme beaucoup.

For car trips Mike and rony are extraordinary people who love their job. They are adorable, professional and very pleasant,

We'll come back and call on them.

reviews.title: Exceptional Excursions
reviews.text: Before leaving the UK for our family holiday to Mauritius I wanted to book some excursions with a local company. After reading many positive  reviews on Trip Advisor about Belle Mare Tours I sent them an email with my enquiry. Kavi responded really quickly and helped create an itinerary of 4 excursions. Belle Mare Tours did not disappoint and were much cheaper than other tour operators without compromising on quality. Our drivers and guides included Roni, Mike & Avi who were all superb, friendly and knowledgeable. Roni was great at taking so many photos and videos of our hike to the 7 Waterfalls which was spectacular. On arrival in Mauritius, communication with Belle Mare Tours was via WhatsApp and we were kept up to date with pick up times from our hotel, recommendations as to suitable clothing and any alterations due to weather/tide times. I would thoroughly recommended Belle Mare Tours. Thank you for making our holiday so memorable.

Also, the fast boat day on the 5 islands was superb, especially as there was a very good atmosphere in our group of travelers (max 15 people).
Finally, the rates are very correct compared to the rates offered by the hotels.

reviews.title: Great Service for tours from a well run local travel agent in Belle Mare Mauritius
reviews.text:
We were very impressed with the service given by this local tour agent during our stay in Belle Mare in late June and Early July 2024. 
The tours were very competitively priced and were run with great professionalism, on time and as described in the web site. Particular mention of the two drivers Michael and Avi who were very knowledgeable, friendly and helpful as we did tours with them of South and North plus Northern Islands Catamaran Trip and Bentier Island Speedboat and Dolphins Trip and they made these trips memorable for us. 
We also used the agency to book a Taxi with driver Michael to Flacq market on Sunday which was cheaper than most other local options available. 
You can book in advance of travel with the agency office, who again were very helpful and courteous in all our dealings with them both pre departure and locally at their office in Quatre Cocos, Belle Mare and via our Whats App conversations when in resort.  
Thoroughly recommend anyone staying in the Belle Mare area look this agent up when planning excursions during their stay. John and Sue Ferguson

Belle Mare Tours exceeded all our expectations, delivering an unforgettable tour of Mauritius. The combination of knowledgeable and personable guides, well-designed itineraries, and exceptional customer service made for a truly outstanding experience. Whether you're seeking adventure, culture, or relaxation, Belle Mare Tours offers a perfect way to discover the beauty and charm of Mauritius. I highly recommend them to anyone planning a visit to this paradise island.

Additionally, the drivers provided by Belle Mare Tours were exceptional. They were not only professional and punctual but also incredibly friendly and accommodating. Their expertise in navigating local roads ensured smooth and comfortable journeys, enhancing our overall experience. reviews.title: Outstanding time from start to finish!
reviews.text:
We did two excursions with Belle Mare Tours , the first to the Tamarin Falls and the second to hike Le Morne Brabant.
Each one was booked by e-mail via Kavi who was superb - he was prompt with all the information, pricing, details and answered all my questions.
On both occasions our driver Mike was prompt to pick us up from our hotel, he was very chatty, and gave us some great tips about going out and about. 
We expected to be part of a group for the excusions but on both days, we had a private guide. Ashley was our guide at the waterfalls, he was extremely friendly, told us about the flora and fauna around and took some great photos for us.
I was a little nervous about the climb to the top of Le Morne as I have a fear of heights but Alandro made me feel safe at all times, guided us on the best routes and wow, what a spectacular sight from the top!
You should definitely book your trips with this company - the service, communication and value for money are all excellent
Thank you so much to you all, our experience of Mauritius was all the better for our days out with you!
reviews.author: Sarah N

reviews.title: Excellent in every way
reviews.text:
We are returning from 10 days in Mauritius on the east coast. We went through Belle Mare Tours and have already made our France program and blocked the dates. It's all done so easily.
Go there with your eyes closed:
- Very competitive prices, cheaper than everything I had looked at and compared
- Speed of response and responsiveness
- Flexibility and modular program as desired with them
- Punctuality
- and what can we say about our guide who accompanied us for 3 days, Roni, extremely kind, so attentive to us. He went out of his way to show us his island, without looking at the time.
We highly recommend this agency, which we will contact again on our next stay without any hesitation.
Go there with your eyes closed

reviews.title: Highly recommended
reviews.text: Brilliant! We did two of the tours with Belle Mare - North tour and South tour. We also used them for a day trip to Curepipe. Much cheaper than the hotel taxis. Our driver for all three was Roni who was fabulous. Very friendly but relaxed and he took the time to understand what we were looking to see and geared the day towards that. Some nice stops to try some local snacks and he even guided us round Vanilla Park as he clearly has a passion for animal conservation. I cannot fault the service we got for the price we did and would highly recommend Belle Mare tours to anyone looking to explore the beautiful island of Mauritius.

We came back in 2013, and again this year, and even if we changed sides (to the NW this time), Geerja organized our outings for us at the best, with the professionalism and kindness that characterizes her. The team has of course grown and the agency has been created, but everyone has their hearts on their sleeves. Thank you and see you very soon I hope for a 4th appointment ❤️

reviews.text: Year after year we always enjoy asking for advice and calling on Noorani and Satar for excursions, transfers, car or scooter rental. I highly recommend this great team. They know their Island and the Island knows them.

reviews.title: Reliable and good, but ask a few questions before you book so you get the right experience
reviews.text:
We did two tours with Belle Mare Tours. A taxi ride on the northern part of the island with a great driver named Mike. Fresh car, no stress and affordable.

A week later we went on a catamaran sailing trip to Ile aux Cerf. It was a little too full with people and the boat was not super fresh. There was mold in one of the liquor bottles they mixed drinks with. However, the food they grilled was good and the island we went to was absolutely fantastic. It wasn't that expensive to go, but next time we would have probably tried to choose a more premium variant with fewer people and a newer boat, we would have gladly paid extra for that. Nice staff though.

All bookings were made via WhatsApp and they responded quickly and smoothly.
reviews.author: RobertM

reviews.title: Best value for money Super Team
reviews.text:
Great quality/price ratio
Team of kindness and 1 professionalism.
We are more than delighted (delighted) with our excursions, the 5 islands, Flat Island and Gabriel Islet and What can we say about swimming with the Dolphins, the Chamarel circuit and Grand Bassin!!! GORGEOUS  !!!
Thanks to Noorani and Satar
reviews.author: claude p

reviews.title: Hike to Koh Lanta with great guide!
reviews.text: We did the 5 waterfalls with the guide Bernard, it was I N C R O Y A B L E! Breathtaking landscapes but also a kind, caring guide who takes great photos. We recommend with our eyes closed, hotel/waterfall transport + hiking with this really great guide! Thank you for the koh Lanta experience ;)
reviews.author: Benedicte_Del

reviews.title: Friendly and unobtrusive advice. Great activities!
reviews.text:
We discovered Belle Mare Tours by chance. After extensive and competent advice, we (4 people) decided on the South Tour and the Catamaran excursion. We arranged both tours easily and conveniently via WhatsApp. The pick-ups from the hotel went smoothly. Robert, our driver, showed us various attractions. He was informative, relaxed and very pleasant! The catamaran tour was an experience due to the waves. The food, crew and organization were great! 
Thank you again for the great experience. 5/5
reviews.author: Mal T

reviews.title: Very helpful and flexible tour operators
reviews.text: Nooraini and Greeja helped to piece up our itenarary for a family of 14 which include seniors, teenagers and kids under 6. They took very good care of us and was very flexible in rearranging transportation and day trips when our flight got very delayed which affected the pre-planned programs. They also arranged for us to have the same driver to take us around when possible and we all had a great time, especially the private catamaran trip which was the highlight for us.
reviews.author: Frances K

reviews.text: Very friendly and helpful agency. We were staying at the Sunrise attitude and wanted to book an island tour. It was a 15 minutes walk to the agency. There we booked 2 tours: one for the south, and another for the north. We chose a whole day private tour in an SUV option for each tour. Our driver was Mike. He made our day(s) an extraordinary experience. He took into consideration what we would like to see and do. The price was fair and much  better than what we'd have paid at the hotel. We can absolutely recommend Mike and the agency. Thanks a lot!
reviews.author: Elie Touma

reviews.text: Great experience and nice people
reviews.author: cornel oduor

reviews.title: Super private tour Mauritius
reviews.text:
We did two private tours - a north and a south tour - each with Mike. He is a good and safe driver (traffic is a bit chaotic for Europeans sometimes).

The south tour was particularly nice because there was a lot of nature to see (Charmarel, 7-colored-earth etc., Black River Gorges). Away from the many visitors, he also took us to particularly beautiful viewpoints. He accompanied us well and provided us with all the information that was important to us.

Mike was very nice and friendly, made suggestions and took our wishes into account. He was also happy to answer our many questions about Mauritius beyond the sights.

We were very satisfied and would recommend him - and Belle Mare Tours - at any time. Thank you again for everything.
reviews.author: Dieter B

reviews.title: superb stay
reviews.text: We have used Belle Mare tours several times during our stays. for transfers, day taxis, and excursions. everything is perfect; the taxi picks you up from the hotel and takes you back there, punctually. Thanks to Roni for these explanations during the taxi days. we hope to have more days with him; Thanks Kadir for the transfer. and above all thank you to Geerja for her professionalism, her kindness, and her responsiveness. we recommend. and we will call Belle Mare Tours again.
reviews.author: Rita J

reviews.title: 5 Island Speed Boat Trip
reviews.text:
Well, what can we say ... Absolutely amazing!!! We did the 5 island trip with Belle Mare Tours on a private speed boat today (5th December 23). 

Excellent service from start to finish, and our skipper Chris was first class. He explained everything clearly and took our safety a priority Highly recommend. We had an amazing day. 👏
reviews.author: Flo20450

reviews.text:
Fantastic agency. From France, we organized five tours and airport transfers to and from our hotel at very reasonable prices. We had the pleasure of being guided by Mike for five days. Always punctual, smiling, and a safe driver, Mike showed us Mauritius and its way of life. A huge thank you to him for his kindness.

A final thank you to Geerja, who was able to arrange a last-minute, unexpected trip for our teenage daughter, and to Mike, who surprised us by making himself available for her.
reviews.originalText:
Agence formidable. Nous avons depuis la France organisé 5 visites et les transports de l aeroport à l hotel pour des prix plus qu abordables . Nous avons eu le bonheur d être guidé sur 5 jours par Mike. Toujours ponctuel, souriant, conduisant en toute sécurité, Mike nous a fait découvrir l ile maurice et ses modes de vie. Encore un grand merci à lui pour sa gentillesse.
Un dernier remerciement à geerja , qui a pu organiser au pied levé un petit trajet imprévu pour notre fille adolescente  , et à Mike qui nous à fait la surprise de se rendre disponible pour elle.
reviews.author: Gilles Gambin

reviews.text: Great agency, very friendly and with reasonable prices. We were very happy with the two outings we did thanks to the agency and we recommend it.
reviews.originalText: Super agence, très aimable et avec des prix raisonnables. Nous avons été très content avec les deux sorties que nous avons fait grâce à l’agence et nous recommandons.
reviews.author: Diana C.

reviews.text: Excellent service provider! We booked three excursions on the island: Grand Baie, a tour of the five islands, and the Quatre Bornes market over three days. The taxis were punctual and the service was high-quality, all at affordable prices compared to those charged by hotels. We especially loved the boat trip, particularly the visit to Île aux Fouquets, the dolphin watching, and the snorkeling at Île aux Aigrettes! Thank you so much!
reviews.originalText: Très bon prestataire, nous avons réservés 3 escursions sur l'ile : Grand baie, la visite des 5 iles et le marché de Quatre Bornes sur 3 journées. Les taxis sont a l'heure et les services qualitatif pour des prix abordables comparés aux prix affichés dans les hôtels. Petit coup de coeur pour la journée en bateau et notamment l'ile aux Fouquets, les dauphins et le snorkeling à l'ile aux Aigrettes  ! Merci infiniment !
reviews.author: marine SMITH

reviews.text: Excellent service with the "5 Islands" excursion, including Île aux Cerfs. Our skipper was careful and attentive. The BBQ was delicious. We had a wonderful time and left with beautiful memories. We highly recommend this company.
reviews.originalText: Excellentes prestations avec l'excursion "les 5 îles" incluant l'île aux Cerfs. Notre skipper était prudent et attentionné. Le BBQ était très bon. Nous avons passé d'excellents moments et repartons avec de beaux souvenirs plein la tête. Nous recommandons ce prestataire.
reviews.author: Pascale Hernandez

reviews.title: Excellent service from a local travel bureau
reviews.text: Very helpful. We walked to Belle Mare to this small travel agency which handily is opposite a change bureau. We organised two trips - so much cheaper than booking via our hotel. Would recommend.
reviews.author: readybrekSurrey_UK

reviews.title: Certainly not recommend
reviews.text: Really bad customer service. The team acted on instructions I didn't give. Fought with me, over the phone, admitting their mistake but rudely refused to rectify, saying that I had to find a solution for what THEY did wrong. Dismissed my explanation of the implications of their mistake and asked me to not talk about this again. On the bright side, the tour was amazing. The staff from Robin de Mer Ltee were all excellent. So maybe next time we'll book via another agent.
reviews.author: Jemima

reviews.title: Great Choice
reviews.text: Great team, best service. We had several wonderful outings with Bel Mare Tours on water and great trips with Mike on land to visit the North and the South of the Island. Highly recommended!
reviews.author: Dr S

reviews.text: We had a very good experience with Belle Mare Tours; they responded quickly to our requests. The guide to Le Morne Brabant gave us excellent advice, and we spent two wonderful days with Ronny, our driver, who was very keen to share his knowledge of Mauritius.
reviews.originalText: Très bonne expérience avec Belle Mare Tours, réponses rapides à nos demandes. Nous avons été bien orientés sur le guide du Morne Brabant et nous avons passé 2 très belles journées avec Ronny qui nous conduisait et avait à coeur de partager sur l'Ile Maurice.
reviews.author: Celine ETIENNE

reviews.text: We had cappuccinos and paninis for breakfast. The coffees were good, the paninis were okay.
reviews.originalText: Desayunamos capuccinos y paninis. Los cafés estaban buenos, los paninis correctos.
reviews.author: SANDRA FERNANDEZ

reviews.text:
We were torn between 4 and 5 stars, as it's a solid 4.5. We did the South Tour first to see what it was like. It cost just under €60 for the two of us, since you pay for the "taxi"—so the price would be the same for four people! Our taxi guide was Mike, who told us a few details about the various places during the drive. It wasn't like a guide from a tour operator, but we were fine with that. I'll post the list of the rides below. We were happy with the tour, especially with the price, as we would have paid €115 per person with our tour operator. The only thing we didn't like about the tour was the Floreal segment. You visit four shops where they first demonstrate how they make clothes or model ships, and then there's a tea and rum tasting. This always takes a few minutes before they get to the actual point: selling. The ladies at the cashmere shop were also very annoying and pushy. Well, unfortunately, it was our fault for saying we were interested. I suspect if they said they weren't interested, they wouldn't necessarily go there. Nevertheless, the tour was very good in the end. That same evening, we also booked the North Tour, which was also very nice, although I have to say that the Port Louis stop was too short. You're only briefly at the harbor and briefly at the market, or rather, you just walk through it quickly. Perhaps it would be possible to request more time to stroll through the market. This tour cost us exactly the same as the South Tour, and with our tour operator, it was again €115 per person. Even before the North Tour started, we spontaneously booked the 5 Islands Tour for the next day. Only the South Tour wasn't spontaneous; the others were booked the day before. The 5 Islands Tour costs just under €60 per person, including a BBQ. This excursion would have cost us €150 per person with our tour operator! And this tour is highly recommended. Monkeys are being fed, we briefly saw dolphins from the boat, and I also saw a sea turtle. The 5 Islands Tour is the only one of the three tours where you actually sit with other people on the speedboat. The other two tours are essentially private. Don't forget that the South Tour includes the entrance fee to the Seven Coloured Earths, which costs 550 rupees per person, so it's quite expensive. The North Tour requires an entrance fee of 300 rupees per person for the botanical gardens. We paid €260 for our excursions, excluding entrance fees. With entrance fees, it would be between €290 and €300. With a tour operator, it would be €720, which makes you think twice about doing all the tours, especially with children! Thanks to Geerja and thanks to Mike!

Best regards, Falkenberg
reviews.originalText:
Wir waren am schwanken zwischen 4 und 5 Sternen, da es solide eine 4,5 ist. Wir haben zu erst die South Tour gemacht um zu schauen wie es wird. Für knapp 60€ für uns beide, man zahlt nämlich fürs „Taxi“, für vier Personen würde der Preis also auch gleich bleiben! Unser Taxi Guide war Mike, dieser hat  uns ein paar Einzelheiten bei der Fahrt über einzelne Orte erzählt. Es war nicht wie ein Guide vom Reiseveranstalter, doch damit kamen wir klar. Ich Anschluss poste ich die Liste für die Fahrten.wir waren mit der Tour zufrieden,vor allem mit dem Preis, da wir bei unserem Reiseveranstalter 115€ pro Person bezahlt hätten. Das einzige welcher uns bei der Tour nicht gefallen hat, war der Punkt Floreal. Man klappert 4 Läden ab, wo sie erst zeigen wie sie Kleidung herstellen oder Modelschiffe sowie Tee und Rum Tasting. Das dauert immer paar Minuten bis sie dann zum eigentlichen Ziel kommen und zwar verkaufen. Die Damen beim Cashmere Laden waren auch sehr nervig und anstrengend. Naja unsere Schuld war es leider das wir gesagt haben das wir uns dafür interessieren. Ich vermute wenn sie sagen, das interessiert uns nicht dann werden sie auch nicht unbedingt dahin fahren. Nichtsdestotrotz war Tour am ende sehr gut. Am selben Abend buchten wir noch die Nordtour, diese war auch sehr schön obwohl ich sagen muss, dass der Spot Port Louis zu kurz kommt. Man ist kurz am Hafen und kurz auf dem Markt bzw. Man läuft schnell drüber. Vielleicht ist es da auch möglich zu sagen wir wollen noch länger über den Markt schlendern. Diese Tour hat uns genau so viel gekostet wie die South Tour und bei unserem Reiseveranstalter  wieder 115€ pro Person. Wir buchten auch schon bevor die North Tour los ging wieder spontan für den nächsten Tag die 5 Island tour. Nur die South Tour war nicht spontan , die anderen wurden ein Tag vorher gebucht. Die 5 Island tour kostet knapp 60€ pro Person inkl einem BBQ, dieser Ausflug hätte uns bei unserem Reiseveranstalter 150€ pro Person gekostet! Und diese Tour ist wirklich zu empfehlen. Es werden Affen gefüttert, wir haben vom Boot kurz Delfine gesehen, ich habe habe auch ne Wasserschildkröte gesehen.  Die 5 Island Tour ist die einzige Tour von den dreien wo sie wirklich mit anderen auf dem Speedboat sitzen. Die anderen beiden Touren sind quasi privat.  Nicht zu vergessen ist das bei der South Tour der Eintrittspreis zur sieben farbige Erde gezahlt werden muss, dieser kostet 550Rupien pro Person also ziemlich teuer. Bei der North Tour muss man den Eintritt für den botanischen Garten zahlen der kostet 300 Rupien pro Person. Wir haben für unsere Ausflüge jetzt 260€ bezahlt exkl. Eintritt. Mit Eintritt zwischen 290-300€. Beim Reiseveranstalter wären das 720€, da überlegt man sich zwei mal ob man alle Touren macht, vor allem mit Kindern! Danke an Geerja und danke an Mike!
Viele Grüsse
Falkenberg
reviews.author: Artur F

reviews.text:
A fantastic team! They know how to reschedule activities when necessary so you can make the most of your excursions, unlike hotels that take you out in the rain or high winds.
Thank you to the team and a huge thank you to Satar!
reviews.originalText:
Une équipe formidable ! Sait reporter les activités lorsqu'il le faut pour profiter un maximum des excursions contrairement aux hôtels qui vous amènent sous la pluie ou grand vent.
Merci à l'équipe et merciii à Satar !
reviews.author: Aurélie Le Sénéchal

reviews.title: What a wonderful experience- Thank you.
reviews.text: We has such an amazing time. I want to say Thank you to Ronny and Noorani for the wonderful experience.  Looking forward to our next time in Mauritius. I would definitely be using them again.
reviews.author: Michael A

reviews.title: Beware of bogus emails from Belle Mare
reviews.text: We used belle mare tours in 2022 and the excursion was excellent however 12 months later we are receiving phishing emails from their email address with bogus invoices attached, please be wary of any emails received from them
reviews.author: Dave

reviews.title: Wonderful 😊 Mauritius
reviews.text: Reggie N, firstly I must say that Belle Mare tours made our experience on the North and South and Central Flacq memorable one.Their tour guides where the best I would recommend to anyone visiting the island.These guys are so knowledgeable with the history of the island, Mike,Sona,too good and not to mention their rates where the best in the whole of Mauritius.I recommended a few people where I was holidaying, because they where getting exorbitant rates, thanks you Geerja making our holiday a fantastic and Fabolous one.👍👍👍👍😍🤓
reviews.author: Paradise32490346059

reviews.title: Great experience, thank you very much!
reviews.text:
We did 7 outings with Belle Mare Tours and everything was perfect from A to Z: very responsive in the exchange of emails to prepare the outings, the guides always on time and very careful on the road, very good advice and helpful. constant listening to customers, surprise stops for us to taste local dishes. They are accommodating if the weather is not good to move sea trips. The price is also much cheaper than the trips offered by hotels for a personalized service.
In short, we highly recommend them, with Belle Marre Tours you don't have to think about anything, just enjoy!
A BIG thank you to Mike and Rony who were our driver-guides during these outings and who were just perfect!
See you soon
reviews.author: Nadia F

reviews.text:
We took seven excursions with Belle Mare Tours and everything was perfect from start to finish: they were very responsive in their email exchanges to prepare the trips, the guides were always punctual and very careful on the road, they gave excellent advice and were always attentive to our needs, and they made surprise stops to let us taste local dishes. They are accommodating if the weather isn't cooperating and can reschedule sea excursions. The price is also much lower than the excursions offered by hotels for such a personalized service.

In short, we highly recommend them. With Belle Mare Tours, you don't have to worry about a thing, just enjoy!

A huge thank you to Mike and Rony, who were our driver-guides during these excursions and who were simply perfect!
reviews.originalText:
Nous avons fait 7 sorties avec Belle Mare Tours et tout a été parfait de A à Z : très réactifs dans les échanges de mails pour préparer les sorties, les guides toujours à l,heure et très prudent sur la route, très bon conseils et à l'écoute constante des clients, arrêts surprises pour nous faire déguster les mets locaux. Ils sont arrangeants si la météo n'est pas au rendez vous pour déplacer des sorties en mer. Le prix est aussi beaucoup moins cher que les sorties proposé par les hôtels pour un service personnalisé.
Bref nous les recommandont vivement, avec Belle Marre Tours vous n'avez rien à penser, juste à profiter !
Un BIG Merci à Mike et Rony qui étaient nos chauffeurs-guides pendant ces sorties et qui étaient juste parfaits !
reviews.author: Nadia F

reviews.title: Mauritius honeymoon
reviews.text: Belle Mare tours were excellent with specific mention to our guide Ronnie who went out of his way to make the experience memorable for us. BMT offered flexibility in their tour structure allowing us to tailor it for our preferences. They were also flexible in adjusting our activities to suit the weather
reviews.author: Tharsshan M

reviews.text: This place is overrated and I don't recommend it; it's just a trip on old boats. Our boat broke down in the middle of the sea, and the driver had to fix it, which took a long time. The waterfall they're talking about is small and not worth the trouble.
reviews.originalText: مكان مبالغ فيه و لا انصح فيه مجرد رحله على قوارب قديمه. حيث تعطل بنا القارب في نص البحر و قام السائق باصلاحه و اخذ وقت. الشلال الذي يعدون فيه هو شلال صغير ما يسوى تتعنى له
reviews.author: Ghannam Alshammari

reviews.title: Merci pour ces superbes vacances
reviews.text:
Superbe organisation :-) agence incontournable de l’île. 
A chaque retour sur Maurice je fais appel à cette agence !
Je recommande vivement 
N’hésitez pas :-) 🤩🤩🤩
reviews.author: Emilie B

reviews.text: We came as a family with our three children. I contacted Belle Mare Tours, and we had Roni as our driver and guide. It was a magical experience. He's a fantastic guide who allowed us to discover Mauritius in a different way. He's kind and always thoughtful. We visited the seven waterfalls, and it was amazing. Thank you again for everything, Roni; you made our trip even more magical. Romain, Julie, Noah, Lou, and Jules
reviews.originalText: Nous sommes venus en famille avec nos 3 enfants , j'ai pris contact  avec Belle Mare tours nous avons eu Roni comme chauffeur et guide et ce fut un moment magique, c'est un super guide qui nous a permis de découvrir autrement l'île Maurice  , il est bienveillant et a toujours des petites attentions,  nous avons fait les  7 cascades et c'était génial. merci encore pour tout Roni tu nous a rendu notre voyage encore plus magique ; Romain, Julie , Noah , Lou et Jules
reviews.author: Julie Peyrard

reviews.title: Amazing South Tour with Roni
reviews.text:
We had a great day touring the South & Le Morne with Roni.

He was engaging, knowledgeable & a great photographer also!

He ensured we got the best vantage points & photo opportunities. No staying in the taxi & leaving us to it like some we noticed. 

The only negative was that we didn't get to do the rum tasting at Chamarel as it's closed on a Sunday. He arranged for us to do something locally & I picked up some really nice Pasminas 😉
reviews.author: Siobhan N

reviews.title: Great boot trip
reviews.text: We had a great boot trip with Belle Mare Tours with a lot of fun, music and great snorkeling. Would recommend it
reviews.author: Fabian

reviews.text: I had a very good experience! I booked several activities: a speedboat ride with dolphins and a car rental. They are very friendly, helpful, and respond very quickly.
reviews.originalText: Sehr gute Erfahrung gemacht! Hatte mehrere Aktivitäten gebucht Speed Boot mit Delphinen schwimmen und ein Auto. Sie sind sehr freundlich, hilfsbereit und antworten innerhalb kürzester Zeit.
reviews.author: Colin Meram

reviews.text:
A superb experience thanks to our guide Roni.
The prices weren't inflated like some people might try to charge you on the roadside…
His network of contacts arranged some truly magical trips and excursions for us.
Thank you for everything.
reviews.originalText:
Superbe expérience grâce à notre guide Roni.
Les tarifs n’étaient pas gonflés comme certains peuvent vous le proposer sur le bord de la route …
Le réseau de connaissance nous a fait passer des trajets et des excursions magiques.
Merci pour tout
reviews.author: Sacha Lambert

reviews.title: Séjour parfait
reviews.text:
Nous avons réservé nos excursions avec bellemare tours qui nous avez été recommandé par une amie et nous n avons pas été déçu... la visite du sud nous a permis de rencontrer Roni un guide fabuleux bienveillant et à l ecoute. Il nous a fait découvrir son île, la gastronomie mauricienne. Un beau moment de partage et d échange.
Nous avons également fait l excursion des îles du nord c était fabuleux ainsi que l excursion ile aux cerfs. Rien à dire tout était fabuleux  merci à toute l équipe. 
Nous recommandons cette agence pour la qualité des excursions et les prix qui sont plus que correct au vu des prestations.
Encore merci à toute l équipe et à Roni
reviews.author: Aurelie b

reviews.title: Excellent !
reviews.text:
Superbe expérience avec Belle Mare Tours ! Nous avions initialement réservé le circuit Sud avec Roni et au final nous avons visiter l'île avec lui 4 jours de suite ! C'est un excellent guide, j'ai eu l'impression d'avoir vécu l'émission "échappées belles" à l'île Maurice ! Mon voyage n'aurait pas du tout été le même sans cette agence. Nous avons appris plein de choses sur la culture, la société, le patrimoine et la gastronomie mauricienne. Tout cela accompagné d'humour, d'échanges, de gentillesse et de découvertes.
C'est la 1ere fois que je fais des circuits accompagnée par un guide et je compte le faire désormais au maximum tellement j'ai aimé cette expérience ! En se déplaçant seul, on a certes accès aux mêmes lieux d'intérêt mais il manque le plus important : le partage et la découverte de la culture de l'autre.
Les tarifs sont bien inférieurs à ceux que nous avons vu ailleurs. Les excursions sont variées  Je recommande à 200% et j'espère pouvoir à nouveau faire appel à leurs services un jour.
Merci encore pour la découverte de l'Ile !
reviews.author: Delphine T

reviews.text:
A superb experience with Belle Mare Tours! We initially booked the South tour with Roni, but we ended up exploring the island with him for four consecutive days! He's an excellent guide; I felt like I was on the TV show "Échappées Belles" in Mauritius! My trip wouldn't have been the same at all without this agency. We learned so much about Mauritian culture, society, heritage, and cuisine. All of this was accompanied by humor, conversation, kindness, and discoveries.
This is the first time I've taken a tour with a guide, and I intend to do it as often as possible from now on because I loved the experience so much! While traveling on your own certainly gives you access to the same places of interest, you miss the most important thing: sharing and discovering another culture.
The prices are much lower than what we've seen elsewhere. I recommend them 200%, and I hope to use their services again someday.
Thanks again, Roni!
reviews.originalText:

reviews.title: Good Service
reviews.text:
Did Elle Auz cerf tour with them , I would say there price is lesser then other vendors without compromising on the quality.
Besides , cab driver named Roni was amazing.He is a great guy and provided us  a rich experience on Maurtius tour.
