reviews.title: Thank you Ronnie at Belle Mare Tours - highly recommend
reviews.text:
We visited Mauritius in May 23 and initially booked Belle mare tours for our airport transfer. Ronnie picked us from the airport and from the moment we arrived he looked after us very well. He even treated us to some Mauritius street food which was lovely. From this day every trip we booked was with Ronnie and everyday he looked after us and showed us around. He was very informative and helpful with everything always going out of his way to make sure we had a good time. Our trip wouldn’t have been the same without him. Thank you so much Ronnie. Highly recommend!!
From Mishika & Maina
reviews.author: Mishika D

reviews.title: Great fun, will recomend
reviews.text: We found Ronnie walking around and he was very courteous and extremely helpful. He went out of his way to help us and show us around. He was great company and a great photographer to boast. Over all a great and memorable experience. We liked him so much that we booked a nature and dolphin trip for our last day and it was definitely the best day on the island for us.
reviews.author: Piransu

reviews.title: Really nice Catamaran Cruise !
reviews.text: We booked the Catamaran Cruise 3 Northern Island Adventure Tour and can recommend i t! If you are on holiday in Mauritius, you should definitely visit these beautiful islands (white dream beach and turquoise blue water). The beaches on Mauritius itself are not nearly as beautiful. We even saw water turtles and rays - really a unique experience. The guides on the boat are very friendly and funny. The food was also very tasty.
reviews.author: Loïc R

reviews.text: Excellent tour operator. We booked a dolphin tour including lunch on an island and were completely satisfied! Thank you so much!
reviews.originalText: Suoer Touranbieter. Wir haben eine Delfin-Tour inkl. Mittagessen auf einer Insel gebucht und sind von A bis Z zufrieden! Vielen Dank!
reviews.author: patrick hess

reviews.text: We booked the Catamaran Cruise 3 Northern Island Adventure Tour and can wholeheartedly recommend it. If you're vacationing in Mauritius, you absolutely must visit these beautiful islands (dreamy white beaches and turquoise waters). The beaches on Mauritius itself aren't nearly as beautiful! We even saw sea turtles and rays – a truly unique experience. The guides on the boat are very friendly and funny. The food was also delicious.
reviews.originalText: Wir haben die Catamaran Cruise 3 Northern Island Adventure Tour gebucht und können diese uneingeschränkt weiterempfehlen. Wenn man auf Mauritius Urlaub macht sollte man diese wunderschönen Inseln unbedingt besuchen (weißer Traumstrand und türkisblaues Wasser). Die Strände auf Mauritius selbst sind nicht annähernd so schön!! Wir haben sogar Wasserschildkröten und Rochen gesehen - wirklich ein einmaliges Erlebnis. Die Guides auf dem Boot sind sehr sympathisch und lustig. Das Essen war auch sehr lecker.
reviews.author: E. H.

reviews.text: Terrible experience! We booked a tour of the south of the island, and the driver first took us to a shop (Boutik Polo Club in Floréal) with which he is clearly in cahoots. Everything is designed to rip us off: no prices displayed, no answers when we ask, confusion at the till, and by the time we realize we've been scammed, it's already too late! The tax refund we received was actually less than half of what we were told! As for the quality, it's not worth the exorbitant prices once you convert them to euros! Don't fall into the trap, the lesson is harsh :(
reviews.originalText: Expérience très mauvaise! Nous avons réservé un tour du sud de l'Ile, le chauffeur nous a emmenés d'abord dans une boutique (Boutik Polo Club à Floréal) avec laquelle il est manifestement de connivence. Tout est fait pour nous arnaquer : aucun prix affiché, pas de réponse quand on les demande, embrouille à la caisse, le temps de réaliser qu'on s'est fait avoir c'est déjà trop tard ! Le montant de la détaxe récupéré est en fait moins de la moitié de ce qui nous a été annoncé ! Quant à la qualité, elle ne vaut pas les tarifs exorbitants quand on a fait la conversion en euros ! Ne tombez pas dans le piège, la leçon est sévère :(
reviews.author: V Isrt

reviews.title: Viste gâchée par de l'escroquerie
reviews.text:
Si le chauffeur Mike vous accompagne pour un tour du sud de l'Ile, restez sur vos gardes. Il vous emmène dans des boutiques, certainement contre une commission et là c'est l'arnaque assurée malgré une gentillesse apparente ! 
Embrouilles, tarifs exorbitants pour une qualité médiocre, mensonges sur le prix de la détaxe (au final à peine la moitié de ce qui est annoncé) ! Cela nous a gâché une partie de nos vacances, l'impression d'avoir été pris pour des pigeons !
reviews.author: laurent C

reviews.title: A éviter ! Arnaques en vue
reviews.text:
Le chauffeur nous a conduit dans un traquenard sans nous mettre en garde contre les vendeuses qui nous racontent n’importe quoi pour vendre ! Des prix qui ne sont pas affichés, des promesses de détaxe très loin de la réalité. Il est manifestement de mèche avec elles.
C’est vraiment dommage et nous a gâché notre séjour.
reviews.author: Vinciane I

reviews.title: First class service
reviews.text: We found out about this company prior to visiting the island, and weren’t we lucky! They were excellent, from our initial emails to the many trips we did, their service was always first class. We can’t recommend them highly enough, thanks Kavi, Geerja, Ranjay and Cedar for taking care of us.
reviews.author: JACF815

reviews.title: séjour famille et amis
reviews.text:
Comme promis, iles paradisiaques, nous avons fait 3 excursions 
ille du nord, 5 iles et 1 journée en van pour découvrir chamarel .....
c'est une équipe formidable, gentil, professionnelle, se plie en 4 pour vous satisfaire.
Je recommande à 100%..
reviews.author: MAGALI D

reviews.text: Everything was fantastic and the cabin crew were incredibly attentive, making sure we had the best possible day. I recommend it 1000%.
reviews.originalText: Tout était formidable et le personnel navigant était de toutes les attentions pour nous faire passer la meilleure des journées. Je recommande a 1000%.
reviews.author: Alexandre Venec

reviews.title: Vacances entre mère et fille
reviews.text:
Expérience super sympa grâce à Noorani, Satar et leurs collaborateurs ! Chaque fois que nous venons à l’île Maurice nous faisons appel à eux et nous ne sommes jamais déçues ! De vrais professionnels, qui nous conseillent et qui gèrent !! Hâte de revenir :-)
Véro & Laura
reviews.author: Laura T

reviews.title: Iles du sud
reviews.text: Nous avons passé la journée dans les îles du sud, un paradis sur terre, bel accueil, repas au top. Encore merci pour ces souvenirs à jamais gravé sans nos têtes
reviews.author: Sandra H

reviews.title: Sortie unique !
reviews.text:
Magnifique organisation!!
Un grand merci pour la flexibilité, les bons conseils et un service de qualité.

Passage par l’île au cerf avec un déjeuner sur la plage avec un service 4 étoiles qui nous a beaucoup touché par sa qualité, le goût des mets ainsi que l’accueil et la fin du repas en musique.

Nous en gardons un excellent souvenir, a bientôt!
reviews.author: NorthStar54299030344

reviews.title: Tours in Mauritius
reviews.text: We used Belle Mare Tours after they were recommended by somebody at our hotel  Sunrise attitude. Geerja was very professional and knowledgeable in helping us decide which tours to do. We did 3 all day tours which were excellent but the Blue Cruise was amazing.  We saw dolphins and our captain Desailly was excellent and adapted our private tour to suit us. Good time had by all, highly recommended.
reviews.author: Malcolm J

reviews.title: Une agence très sérieuse
reviews.text:
Nous sommes passés par cette agence pour les transferts de l aéroport à notre hôtel et pour les excursions du nord et du sud de l'île. 
Notre chauffeur était Robert, je le recommande à 100% il est prévenant, vous fais découvrir son île avec passion.
Encore merci Robert
reviews.author: Frédéric G

reviews.text:
The lady was sweet, but it was our mistake booking a catamaran tour not asking details.
Ended up on a boat packed with about 25 guests (!) and four crew members. It wasn’t spacious enough for that number, but would comfortably fit ten, max fifteen people.
As a result, there is no place to chill and relax, so in couple of hours everyone already looked tired. And the tour lasted from 900 to 1600, including almost two useless hours wasted on a nearby island that is not better than any other beach on Mauritius.
I’d be happy to pay twice the price to cut the crowd in half, only if I knew it earlier.
reviews.author: Ruslan I.

reviews.title: Excurssion
reviews.text:
Nous sommes passé par belle mare tour pour nos 5 excursions. En mer top du top ambiance géniale j ai adoré. Coup de cœur pour Ile aux cerfs en catamaran
En terre, sehad en guide. Ponctuel, sérieux, intéressant nous explique le long du trajet la vie mauricienne. Niveau tarif très bon rapport qualité prix 
Je vous les conseilles
reviews.author: Laetitia M

reviews.title: TRES BONNE AGENCE
reviews.text:
Nous avons fait appel à Belle Mare Tours afin de faire la croisière en bateau rapide à L'Ile aux Cerfs. ils on tout organisé et se sont même chargés d'effectuer le transfert (aller-retour) de nos 2 amis qui se trouvaient à Grand Baie pour nous rejoindre et effectuer la croisière. La journée a été exceptionnelle avec en prime les dauphins au retour.
Ils se sont même chargés de nos transferts inter-hotels (de Belle Mare vers Trou aux Biches) à des prix très corrects et compétitifs. Nous remerçions Noorani ainsi que Kavi et Greeja pour leur gentillesse et leur sérieux. Une dernière petite pensée pour Lucas, qui s'est chargé de rendre notre transfert vers l'aéroport très intéressant et agréable.
reviews.author: marie l

reviews.title: Private speedboat tour of the islands
reviews.text: Great day out on a private speedboat. Belle mare were quick to respond and organise the trip. They organise pick up and drop off from our hotel and we’re much cheaper than the hotel prices. Jimmy, our captain, was great and was really relaxed and good with the children. We saw all the islands and fed some monkeys. It was a great way to find a good spot to snorkel. Overall a great day and highly recommended.
reviews.author: Darren T

reviews.text: A leisurely cruise along the coast...
reviews.originalText: Gemütlich der Küste entlang schippern...
reviews.author: Gernot Moitzi

reviews.text: We took two excursions with them during our trip to Mauritius. Absolutely no complaints! They were incredible and magnificent, and the guides were so kind!
reviews.originalText: Nous avons pris 2 excursions avec eux lors de notre passage à l’île Maurice. Rien a redire ! C’était incroyable et magnifique et les accompagnateurs sont d’une gentillesse !
reviews.author: Léa Béranger

reviews.title: Excellent tour company and very knowledgeable.
reviews.text: Found Belle Mare Tours purely by chance after googling your companies near our hotel (Long Beach). Walked into belle mare and spoke to Geerja in the office and booked tours of the North and South and also the 5 island speedboat tour. Very professional. We upgraded to SUV for the tours and our driver Mike was on time each morning and asked us what we wanted to do and suggested some places, stopping along the way showing us different things. Mike was extremely knowledgeable and polite. Would 100% recommend!
reviews.author: Paul E

reviews.text:
Excellent agency! We booked three excursions with them, as well as airport-hotel transfers. They are very responsive and friendly. We highly recommend Mike for his kindness and his love for Mauritius!
Thank you for these wonderful moments.
reviews.originalText:
Excellente agence, nous avons fait 3 excursions avec eux et les transferts aéroport-hôtel. Ils sont très réactifs et très gentils. Nous recommandons vivement Mike, pour sa gentillesse et son amour pour l’île Maurice !
Merci à vous pour ces beaux moments.
reviews.author: marie molteni

reviews.text: A reliable agency that listens to its clients. You can trust them. A superb day on a catamaran, very well organized. Excellent value for money for worry-free excursions. Many thanks again to Satar, the wonderful and kind organizer who does everything to ensure your satisfaction! I highly recommend them!
reviews.originalText: Une agence sérieuse et à l’écoute du client. Vous pouvez avoir confiance. Une superbe journée en catamaran super bien organisée. Un très bon rapport qualité /prix pour des excursions en toute sérénité. Encore merci à Satar, le super et gentil organisateur qui fait tout pour vous satisfaire ! Je recommande vivement !
reviews.author: Erniedu54

reviews.title: Allez y en toute confiance !
reviews.text: Une agence sérieuse et à l’écoute du client. Vous pouvez avoir confiance. Une superbe journée en catamaran, autour la super île plate, super bien organisée. Un très bon rapport qualité /prix pour des excursions en toute sérénité. Encore merci à Satar, le super et gentil organisateur qui fait tout pour vous satisfaire ! Je recommande vivement !
reviews.author: Thierry S

reviews.title: Die Nordtour war sehr schön
reviews.text: Die Nordtour hat uns sehr gut gefallen. Es wäre nur sehr schön gewesen, wenn uns in Port Louis mehr gezeigt worden wäre.
reviews.author: K.D.

reviews.text:
I highly recommend it. We had a memorable day. The guide was fantastic 👍
And very good value for money.
reviews.originalText:
Je recommande vivement. Nous avons passé une journée mémorable. Le guide au top 👍
Et très bon rapport au niveau prix.
reviews.author: Rafouki 19

reviews.title: Nice and reliable team
reviews.text:
Feel free to choose this travel agency to go around the island. They are reliable, work at a good price, respond quickly, and are flexible. I wholeheartedly recommend them.

We took part in 4 different tours, our driver Mike with the SUV was super nice.

We took part in the northern and southern car tours, as well as the 3-island catamaran tour in the north. And we had a half day tour to Vanille park in the south.
reviews.author: Dorka L

reviews.text: They are professionals, the price is good and you can trust them.
reviews.author: oana

reviews.text: Absolutely recommended! Our trip was well organised, staff was fun and everything worked out perfectly. Thank you, we had a lovely day!
reviews.author: Linda Jandke

reviews.text: We were a group of seven and had booked two private boat excursions from France, paying a 50% deposit by bank transfer. Unfortunately, bad weather during our stay prevented us from taking these two excursions. We remained in constant contact with Geerja and the agency owner until the very last minute, but everything was cancelled. We received a full refund of our deposit on the spot without any hassle from Belle Mare Tours. We thank this agency and wholeheartedly recommend them for their excellent service, communication, organization, and professionalism. We will definitely return to Mauritius and book with this agency again!
reviews.originalText: Nous étions un groupe de 7 personnes et avions réservé 2 excursions privées en bateau depuis la France avec acompte de 50% versés par virement. Le mauvais temps lors de notre séjour ne nous a pas permis de faire ces deux excursions. Nous sommes restés en contact avec Geerja et le patron de l'agence en permanence jusqu'au dernier moment mais tout a été annulé. Le remboursement TOTAL de notre acompte nous a été restitué sur place sans aucune complication de la part de Belle Mare tours. Nous remercions cette agence et n,ous la recommandons sans retenue pour la qualité de son accueil, ses échanges, son organisation et son professionnalisme. Nous reviendrons à Maurice et réserverons à nouveau dans cette agence !!
reviews.author: Hereiti DS

reviews.title: Excellent services with Belle Mare Tours
reviews.text:
I would highly recommend Belle Mare Tours, someone always replied within 2 hours, easy to book and totally honest and reliable. We booked both the North Tour and South Tour with them, and our drivers / guides were excellent , they were at hotel to pick us up on time, gave us lots of information, very patient and professional. We had Kadir and Mike, both excellent.  Geerja at the admin team whom we booked with was also superb, Always replied promptly, whereas other Tour or Taxi company I emailed to never ever replied to me which is so bad.
I would rate Belle Mare Tour 10/10 , excellent service at very reasonable prices. I won’t book with anyone else.
reviews.author: Winnie SM H

reviews.title: Amazing Tours
reviews.text:
Belle Mare Tours were amazing. We did the North Day Tour and The Catamaran Cruise Tour. Their Catamaran Cruise was amazing. From the service to communication to the crew and tour guides everything was really great. They were quick to respond and very patient working around our schedule.  

The Catamaran Cruise is a must do activity with them. Value for your money. So worth the experience.
reviews.author: Trish

reviews.text: Fabrice was amazing. Went out with him to swim with the dolphins. He helped, assist and gone out of his way to give us an amazing experience.  Thank you sooooo much
reviews.author: Anton Peenz

reviews.title: Amazing trip
reviews.text: If there’s one thing you must do in Mauritius visit belle mare tours and go on their speed boat trip . Includes drinks, lunch and plenty of stops for snorkelling and swimming.we went on New Year’s Eve amazing day out. See the monkeys and waterfalls then onto another island to explore on the way we were lucky to see a pod of dolphins . Stopped off at a protected island to see the beautiful birds . Lunch was on Ile aux Cerfs island food plentiful and loads of rum tasting, watch out for the chilli rum(you have been warned). The two guys who took us made the trip, can’t remember when I’ve laughed so much . If you like speed on the water this is the trip for you. Such a brilliant memory to go home with .
reviews.author: saarhmac

reviews.title: magnifique
reviews.text: tour agréable, belle découverte. Malheureusement, le soleil pas toujours présent. C'était tout de même agréable.
reviews.author: Yves-Michel Perruchoud

reviews.title: touristes exploités au maximum
reviews.text: Nous avons fait la "croisière" en catamaran jusqu'à l'île aux cerfs qui n'avait rien d'une croisière puisque malgré le vent, nous n'avons jamais navigué à la voile...en même temps le timing serré ne pouvait pas le permettre puisque le bateau est utilisé pour faire 2 tours dans la même journée : pendant qu'on vous dépose pendant 3h sur l'île aux cerfs, le bateau est rentabilisé pour faire faire le tour à un autre groupe. Résultat, tout est fait à la va vite, on nous donne rendez vous pour remonter sur le bateau à 13h15 et finalement on nous récupère à 13h45!!! Bien sûr les enfants crevaient de faim puisque manger à 14h n'était pas vraiment prévu..mini arrêt snorkeling dans un endroit où il n'y a pas beaucoup de poisson, retour toujours avec la musique à fond et au moteur, petit détour par la cascade et le retour se fait en minibus et non en bateau puisque le bateau est reparti chercher le 2ème groupe laissé sur l'île aux cerfs...bref, le service ne correspond pas du tout à ce qui est décrit sur leur site. L'équipage est lui très gentil mais les cadences qu'on leur demande en attribuant 2 groupes à un même bateau gâche toute l'excursion.
reviews.author: Gwendoline M

reviews.title: EXCELLENCE in catamaran cruising
reviews.text: We booked a catamaran cruise to Ille Aux Cerf. From the time Our driver, Rajah, was on time on pick us up at the hotel which was an hour away until he dropped us off safely, we had the the most amazing experience. Our catamaran crew.. Vish , Steward, Yash, Bhawan, Jeremy and the rest of the boys always made sure our drinks were full, they music was awesome and the barbecue lunch was outstanding. They were very kind and made us feel so special. The entire experience with Belle Mare is unforgettable and we highly recommend this if you want to have a joyful day of fun and paradise.
reviews.author: Vino Singh

reviews.text: The tour operator... far from the high prices of hotels with their commissions... Superb organization AND professionalism... from the 5 Islands excursion to the dolphins, from Chamarel to the tea... Nothing to complain about except THANK YOU to Noorani and Satar... We will be back and, above all, we will tell everyone about you...
reviews.originalText: LE ....TOUR OPÉRATEUR  ....loin des prix élevés des hôtels avec leurs coms....Super organisation ET sérieux ...de la sortie des 5 îles au Dauphins, de Chamarel au Thé.....Rien à  redire à part MERCI à  Noorani et Satar....Nous reviendrons et surtout Parlerons de Vous....
reviews.author: claude parcou

reviews.title: Topissime
reviews.text: Un pur bonheur en speed boat ou catamaran super équipe attentionnée nous ont fait découvrir des lieux magiques je recommande à 300%
reviews.author: marlène C

reviews.title: Séjour maurice
reviews.text:
Super rencontre avec des personnes très intéressantes et aussi très conviviales 
Très belle prestations à faire sans retenue
reviews.author: thierry g

reviews.title: A recommander
reviews.text: Très bonne organisations, aux petits soins avec les clients, nous avons fait 4 excursions (traversée turquoise,nord évasion, croisière du nord en catamaran,speed boit benitier island ) , demain le sud . Leur taxi vient vous chercher à l’hôtel et il vous accompagne à l’activité. Il vous donne des infos durant le trajet et on peut prendre des photos.Très convivial, super. Muriel et Jean-Bernard (France) très bonnes vacances  , merci !
reviews.author: Muriel K

reviews.text:
Always a pleasure to see the team again. In 13 years, the driver has become the "boss," and the quality, friendliness, availability, and rates are always top-notch!

Thank you! 👌😁
reviews.originalText:
Toujours un plaisir de retrouver l'équipe, en 13 ans, le chauffeur est devenu "chef" et la qualité, la gentillesse, la disponibilité et les tarifs sont toujours au top!
Merci 👌😁
reviews.author: Marion Heymann

reviews.title: Very resonable prices and so knowledgeable staff
reviews.text:
We stayed locally in hotel however the prices in the hotels are always super high. We went around just to compare the prices and definitly this was the lowest of them all. 

Staff was super helpful especially Geerja (the nicest person I meet). 

We book 4 tours unfortunatly we needed to cancel one due to my friend not feeling well and still they were super understandable.

Tours are amazing and drivers super knowlagdable so you have a driver and tour guide in one.

All the tours are amazing and Mauritius is a magica place.

Thank you Belle Mere Tour for making our stay even more magical and thank you for the amazing tours.
reviews.author: Dragana S

reviews.text:
We visit Mauritius end of September and we stayed in Sunrise attitude hotel.
The prices for tours in the hotels are always higher than local agency’s.

We checked around the hotel and we found Belle Mare Tours. Geerja was super helpful and organised few tours for us. Tours were amazing I can definitly say the friendliest team members I ever had a chance to meet.

Prices are so resonable and drives very knowledgable.

Thank you Belle Mare Tours for the amazing tours and hospitality.

Best wishes.
Dragana and Ewelina.
reviews.author: Dragana Stefanovska

reviews.title:
Bellemare Tour Mauritius Island.
Nourani
& Drivers
reviews.text:
Bellemare Tour Mauritius Island.
Nourani
& Drivers

Connaissez-vous l'île Maurice ?
Une Seule et Unique Adresse, si vous devez visiter cette Magnifique Île de l'océan Indien : 
Bellemare Tours.

Accueil personnalisé dès votre arrivée sur l'île avec un chauffeur à votre disposition.
Un grand nombre de choix d'excursions  adaptées à vos envies avec à chaque fois la mise à disposition d'un chauffeur personnel pour la journée. 

N'hésitez pas à solliciter les services de Nourani et de ses nombreux chauffeurs et collaborateurs. 
Nourani est une personne très à l'écoute et qui sera s'adapter parfaitement à toutes vos requêtes. 

Nous concernant, nous avons eu le plaisir d'être assisté par trois de ses chauffeurs.

Seehad, très souriant, accueillant et chaleureux, célèbre de part son Taxi Noir, possède la particularité d'être à l'écoute, sociable et ouvert d'esprit.

Robert, le vétéran de la profession qui de part sa parfaite maîtrise, vous émerveillera de connaissances.

Akash, est pour finir accueillant, très serviable, avenant et toujours disponible pour vous faire découvrir les coins insolites de ce beau pays.

Tous ces chauffeurs sont plus que professionnels.
De vrais guides, qui vont vous apporter et vous enseigner  tout au long de votre voyage, les éléments de connaissance culturels et historiques de cette Île Magnifique.

Lionel & Lizzy
reviews.author: Lizzy

reviews.title: tout simplement parfait
reviews.text: pendant notre séjour nous avons fais toutes nos excursions avec belle mare tours , tout était parfait , satar nous a accompagné pour toutes nos sorties , une gentillesse comme j aibrarement vue , toujours à l écoute et qui essais de satisfaire toutes nos demande , il est juste exceptionnel. merci pour tout , grâce à vous notre séjour a été magique
reviews.author: jerome i

reviews.text:
Excellent organizer of local excursions and activities. We spontaneously discovered their small office during a walk on the beach and subsequently booked two excursions there, including the 5-Island speedboat tour. The six of us chartered our own boat and paid €70 per person – almost a third less than with the major tour operators and their local guides.

Highly recommended!
reviews.originalText:
Sehr guter Veranstalter von lokalen Ausflügen und Aktivitäten. Wir haben das kleine Büro spontan bei einem Strandspaziergang entdeckt und dort im Anschluss zwei Ausflüge gebucht, u.a. die 5-Island -Speedboottour. Hier haben wir zu sechst ein eigenes Boot gechartert bekommen und dafür pro Person 70€ bezahlt - fast ein Drittel weniger als bei den großen Reiseveranstaltern und deren Reiseleitungen vor Ort.
Können wir sehr empfehlen!
reviews.author: R!co

reviews.title: All good
reviews.text:
Have a day trip with Mike south Mauritius.
All good, nice guy good communication with travel operator
reviews.author: Paweł Z

reviews.title: Great ALL-AROUND Service!
reviews.text: THIS COMPANY MADE OUR MAURITIUS VISIT SOOO ENJOYABLE!  We booked several services from this company … 2 airport transfers and 6 different tours.  Geerja in the office was quick to respond to all inquiries.  Robert, our driver, was a very good driver and ensured that we were comfortable, was always timely, and assisted us with park entries etc.  I did a lot of comparative shopping with other companies and found that Belle Mare was the best value.  Go to their website, which has many more activities listed than the few that were listed on TripAdvisor or Viator or Getmyguide.  You can book directly with the company.  You pay on the day of the activity and can cancel your reservation for no penalty if done two days prior to the activity.
reviews.author: Susan H

reviews.title: Car hire for family of 4
reviews.text:
We hired a small car (Nissan Micra) for 2 days. Car was dropped off at  our hotel and picked back up from there. We managed to get a flat tyre
On our first day (luckily made it back to hotel in time) and despite it being Diwali (a public holiday) they came and changed the tyre so we could get out the next day early. While car wasn’t new and had a few scratches it was clean, was an automatic and had aircon. 

Top tip would be to bring one of those chargers that go in the cigarette lighter as despite us not using data there due to cost google maps does follow where you are using gps so you can see where you are and does eat your battery. Set destination when you have wifi too and it will give you directions as well. You can also download maps.me which can be used without data.
reviews.author: aptravels130

reviews.title: Genial
reviews.text: une agence très compétente. excursions très bien organisées, personnel très sympathique et soucieux de notre bien être. toujours disponible. prix plus bas qu'à l'hôtel. cela en vaut la peine
reviews.author: Ferreira2021

reviews.text:
Best Tours ever.  The Driver are frindly and they drive carefully all the Time.
They make always a good price.

Best regards
Conny
reviews.author: C. I.

reviews.text:
A reputable agency, very responsive via WhatsApp.
The guides are very kind and helpful.
The prices are reasonable.
reviews.originalText:
Agence sérieuse, très réactive via whatsapp.
Les guides sont très gentils et très serviables.
Les prix sont correctes.
reviews.author: Naoual L-JAD

reviews.text: A great experience with Belle Mare Tours, both for car rental (cheaper than traditional agencies) and for activities. Excursions are also much more affordable than booking through a tour operator or hotel. The team is very friendly!
reviews.originalText: Bonne expérience chez Belle Mare Tours, autant pour la location de voiture (moins chère que dans les agences traditionnelles) que pour les activités. Les excusions sont également beaucoup plus abordables qu’en passant par un tour opérateur ou par l’hôtel. L’équipe est très sympa !
reviews.author: Kevin C.

reviews.title: Great private trip
reviews.text: Great private Catamaran trip for a group of 7 couples. The crew were great and ensured drinks flowed from beginning to end. The BBQ cooked on the back of the catamaran was delicious, as were the rice, pasta and bread side dishes. Plenty of good music, dancing and all requests for different tracks accommodated. Consensus of opinion amongst all of us gives this trip and the crew 20 out of 10! Highly recommend it!
reviews.author: R0sie16

reviews.title: Une superbe agence
reviews.text: Nous avons fait 3 escurssions génial un gérant super arrangeant. Une agence à découvrir. J était au sunrise attitude juste à côté. Et surtout faite l hydravion. Magnifique j ai fait 3 h de voiture avec un chauffeur de taxi qui m'a raconté toute dont île super agréable
reviews.author: Sébastien

reviews.title: Exceptional service + tour Ile aux Cerfs
reviews.text:
We found Belle Mare Tours when looking for a catamaran cruise to Ile aux Cerfs. Since they offered the same service as other operators for a lower price, we decided to contact them and booked a tour for a specific day. When we arrived at Trou D'eau Douce that day, it was very cloudy and there was a lot of wind, resulting in a relatively wild sea. Therefore, I asked if the snorkeling part of the tour was still going to be held. As the captain of the boat (before embarkation) responded negatively, I checked with Mr Noorani of Belle Mare Tours if it was possible to reschedule last-minute to another day. He was very helpful and allowed us to come back when the weather was better. So for the following 3 days, we informed early in the morning about the weather in the east until the weather was good enough for snorkeling and we did the tour.

The tour itself was great. We were with +- 15 tourists on the catamaran which resulted in more than enough space. Non-limited drinks and great food! We did some snorkeling, visited the waterfalls and had some free time at Ile aux Cerfs.

So in conclusion: Exceptional service and great tour! 100% recommend!
reviews.author: Remco

reviews.text: A reliable agency, attentive and exceeding our expectations. Noorani organized all our excursions and transfers, and we were more than satisfied (he made all our wishes possible, sometimes at the last minute). Ask for Mike as your taxi guide; he loves his island, and his good humor, positive energy, and smile will make your trip an unforgettable experience. Everything was perfect, there's nothing to complain about (plus, their rates are very fair and affordable). We highly recommend this agency. Noorani is responsive and available; you don't have to worry about a thing... and that's really great when you're on vacation! Go for it without hesitation!
reviews.originalText: Agence sérieuse , à l'écoute et à la hauteur de nos attentes. Noorani nous a organisé toutes nos excursions et nos transferts et nous sommes plus que satisfait ( il a rendu possible toutes nos envies, parfois à la dernière minute ). Demandez Mike comme Taxi guide, c'est un amoureux de son île, et sa bonne humeur, son énergie positive et son sourire ferons de votre voyage une expérience inoubliable. Tout était parfait,  il n'y a rien à redire (de plus, leurs tarifs sont vraiment honnêtes et abordables ). Nous recommandons vivement cette agence, Noorani est réactif et disponble , vous n'avez à vous soucier de rien ..  et ça c'est vraiment top quand on est en vancances ! Allez y les yeux fermés!
reviews.author: Caroline Kern Hamade

reviews.title: It's not a cruise, it's a booze cruise
reviews.text:
If you call it a booze cruise, and it deserves 5 stars on tripadvisor.
If you call juste an island cruise, it deserves only 1 star.
That's what it is: a booze cruise for people who want to party.
You will be served free alcohol. The booze cruise started around 10am, by 11am one guy was already dead drunk.
The music was so loud we couldn't talk to each other, if you wanted to communicate we had to go to the bow.
A group of arabs didn't stop drinking for all the cruise, the crew never stopped serving them, just to be sure they were happy.
Btw they smoked no stop, throwing their cigarettes buts in the sea. I don't think a crew member (and Mauritius native) should continue serving alcohol to people who disregard nature like this.
Food was actually not bad, given the small facility they had to cook.
reviews.author: lucio d

reviews.title: À fuir
reviews.text:
Nous avons fait la journée en catamaran jusqu’aux cascades et sur l’île aux cerfs.

Transport aller/retour jusqu’à l’hôtel, au top. Le taxi était à l’heure et arrive quelques minutes à notre débarquement. 

Le reste …. 30 personnes sur le catamaran sans inclure les membres de l’équipage. Autant dire qu’on était les uns sur les autres. Le volume de la musique était bien trop fort pour 6h à bord. Je ne sais pas comment la toute petite fille qui était présente a pu supporter. 

Le temps était très mauvais avant d’embarquer, pas un brin de soleil et pluie. Je ne comprends pas que ce type d’excursion ne soit pas annulé dans ces conditions. Nous n’avons pas du tout profité de la beauté de l’île aux cerfs que nous avons parcouru sous la pluie et trempés. 

Enfin, je ne comprends pas comment les fumeurs à bord ont pu jeter leurs mégots dans l’indifférence générale, même sous les yeux des organisateurs qui n’avaient pas l’air choqués plus que ça… 

Les boissons à volonté à bord, et repas inclus, c’est plutôt un + sauf que les toilettes à bord ne fonctionnaient pas … donc on a limité notre consommation. 

Bref, il est évident que nous sommes repartis sans laisser le moindre pourboire, à fuir à mon sens
reviews.author: Julie B

reviews.text: Very welcoming and good price, cheaper than in hotels
reviews.originalText: Très bon accueil et bon prix moins chère que dans les hôtels
reviews.author: Sébastien

reviews.title: Great company
reviews.text:
From the first enquiry Geerja was super helpful with all the questions we sent trying to arrange our tours for us - as you can imagine with it being our first visit to Mauritius we had lots! We were reminded of pick up times the day before excursions which was great. 

We booked 5 tours in the end;

Blue cruise/ 5 island - shared (Papas Dream)
Dolphin/ Île aux Benitiers  - shared 

North Tour - private
South Tour - private
South East Tour - private

Both Rishi and Mike our drivers for the private tours were excellent. Very friendly, full of information and pointed things out that we would otherwise have missed. Thank you so much for all of your help making our stay in Mauritius extra special.
reviews.author: shubanacadie

reviews.text: Fantastic excursion! We went to see the waterfall in the sea, and along the way we stopped to feed monkeys. We stopped on the way to Lighthouse Island to see dolphins. The owner was super patient, letting all the other boats leave so we could be the only ones to stay and watch the dolphins. After Lighthouse Island, we also went to see a UNESCO-protected island, where we swam, snorkeled, and had lunch on Île aux Cerfs. Everything was great, from Belinda, who is very friendly, to the food, and the affordable price. I highly recommend it.
reviews.originalText: Fantástica excursão, fomos ver a cascata dentro do mar, pelo caminho paramos para alimentar macacos. Paramos a caminho da ilha do farol, para ver golfinhos. O senhor foi super paciente, deixou que todos os barcos fossem embora para sermos os únicos a ficar a ver golfinhos. Depois da ilha farol ainda fomos ver uma ilha protegida pela UNESCO, nadamos e fizermos snorkeling e almoçamos na Ilha aux cerfs. Tudo muito bom, desde a Belinda que é muito simpática, à comida, e ao preço que é acessível. Recomendo muito.
reviews.author: Inês Santos

reviews.title: Quick arrangement, good communication, amazing captain John!
reviews.text: Communication was super easy and prompt. We enquired about the private tour over whatsup in the evening and with no problem Greeja arranged the private boat for island hoping, waterfall, amazing lunch and snorkeling for the very next morning. Our captain John was amazing, knowledgeable and he ride us even to the reef where the huge waves crashes! On our way we even helped one surfer who was in trouble and distress in the water due strong winds and waves.
reviews.author: Uruta

reviews.title: Pour vos transferts et beaucoup plus
reviews.text:
Agence très réactive.
Utilisée deux fois pour des transferts.
Prix très compétitifs pour un service au top.
Je recommande.
reviews.author: Marc L

reviews.title: Una splendida giornata!
reviews.text:
We had a very good time.
Every one was very professional and kind from the very beginning.
The waterfall tour was amazing and the guide SUPER!
Also undersea walking was crazy.
Thank you!
reviews.author: Raffaella R

reviews.title: Très bons guides et prestations
reviews.text:
Nourani, le directeur de l’agence à très bons guides et des très bonnes excursions à proposer. Toujours hyper arrangeant et les sorties se font comme on le souhaite.

Un grand merci à Mike et à Robert qui nous ont accompagné sur deux journées. Très professionnels, sympathiques et bienveillants. 
bonne continuation à vous messieurs.
De la part des deux algériens lyonnais 😅
reviews.author: Aya R

reviews.title: amazing catamaran trip
reviews.text: The most amazing day great value for money friendly welcoming staff and great food and hospitality for the day highly recommend
reviews.author: Lindsey T

reviews.title: Brilliant Tours with Belle Mare Tours
reviews.text: We have just done two excursions with Belle Mare tours, Southern Tour and Swimming with Dolphins including snorkelling and a BBQ on Benitier Island. Both were brilliant experiences, well organised and great value for money. The dolphin swimming was a real memory maker, the crew were great at getting you in the water at the right place to get you up close with the Dolphins. Both trips were made all the better for having Mike as our host for the tour and as taxi. Thanks Belle Mare and thank you Mike.
reviews.author: Kev O

reviews.title: A recommander à 100%
reviews.text:
Plusieurs excursions réalisées avec cette agence.
Top. A l"écoute, disponible, et toujours au meilleur prix !
N'hésitez pas à les questionner, ils répondront à toutes vos attentes.
Disponible et très réactif sur Whats App.
Attention à la Randonnée des 7 cascades, parcours très pentu. Prévoyez de bonnes chaussures.
Un très grand merci à ROY notre guide de la semaine. Le meilleur !
Si vous souhaitez aller à l'Ilot Gabriel demandé à éviter CORAL BELL ...
reviews.author: Cristal78711

reviews.title: Vacances
reviews.text:
Je tiens à remercier Belle Marre Tour pour la réservation simple et rapide. 

Ainsi, le chauffeur Mike d'ailleurs très sympa. 

Je recommande. 

Linda & Quentin
reviews.author: Lynda A

reviews.title: EXCELLENT
reviews.text:
De merveilleux souvenirs des excursions proposées par Noorani et Geerja, collaboratrice très réactive lors de la préparation de ces excursions que nous pouvons joindre par WHATAPPS, très à l'écoute de ses clients. Roy, notre chauffeur, nous a conduits lors de nos 5 excursions. 
Visite de l'île, aménagée à notre demande, combinant un peu du Nord et du Sud, Nage avec les dauphins/île au Bénitier, Les 3 îles du nord en catamaran : pas de chance fortes pluies et énormes creux en mer, journée très perturbée par la météo : pourquoi CORAL BELLE n'a pas annulé et reporté le départ à une autre date ???
Je recommande particulièrement  l'excursion "TRAVERSEE TURQUOISE".
Par contre, la randonnée aux 7 cascades est réservée aux randonneurs AGUERRIS,
grosses difficultés dues aux pentes sévères, chemins très escarpés et rendus glissants par la pluie.
Sinon, je recommande BELLEMARE TOURS qui propose des prix attractifs et reste à l'écoute des demandes particulières de ses clients
reviews.author: LILY85800

reviews.title: Friendly tour company and driver/guide, delivers on what they say, research where u want to eat or spend more time.
reviews.text:
It was easy to book the tour and you can WhatsApp and organize the tours as soon as you reach Mauritius. We took the north tour and had Mike as a driver who was great in providing insights into local life and attractions. The itinerary is exactly as mentioned…Port Louis to visit Citadel, central market and waterfront followed by Pamplemousses, Mon Choisy beach, Grand Baie and Cap Malheureux. We liked the botanical garden, enjoyed the Mon Choisy beach and would recommend to spend more time here if possible and loved the sunset at Cap.
We didn’t like the restaurant which Mike recommended and would suggest u do research and have lunch over there. We didn’t do the south tour, however in hindsight think that if u got to do only 1 tour you should go to south tour first.
reviews.author: Kuldeep K

reviews.text: They offer beautiful and interesting island tours and sea excursions. They listen to their clients to create tailor-made experiences.
reviews.originalText: Proposent de belles et intéressantes visites de l île et sorties en mer. A l écoute des clients pour du "sur-mesure"
reviews.author: Hale Liliane

reviews.title: Super
reviews.text:
Une équipe au top 
De très belles excursions proposées 
Rencontre avec les dauphins merveilleux 
Sortie turquoise magnifique
Le sud et le nord avec Mike au top même avec la pluie 😉
Agence très sérieuse toujours à l heure
Réponse rapide par mail
Je recommande vraiment cette agence
reviews.author: Julie L

reviews.title: En mer: TOP, en terre: FLOP
reviews.text:
Apres 2 excursions en mer puis 2 en terre, resultat:
Restez en mer! dauphins et ile aux benitier: genial, equipe de choc sur bateau, grillade, rhum, deconne, plus d’une quarantaine de dauphins avec qui on a nager (mais pas toujours garantie attention), a l’heure, tres pro, rien a dire.
en mer encore: les 5 iles, ile au cerf circuit: top! les singes, cascades, les iles, le rhum, grillade bien copieuse, pareil que pour les dauphins super capitaine!
parcontre en terre: nord et le sud les circuits.
Les chauffeurs sont pas des guides mais des taxis, on bouffe du magasin le matin (en gros ils font perdre 2h pour acheter des souvenirs) fabrication bateau, textile, rhum…bref naze. le gars vous parle le matin tranquillement, vous manger le midi pour une blinde et pas specialement local, restaurant piege a touriste et eux vous disent local!
puis enfin la visite des lieux mais vous depose et vous vous debrouiller…sans interet!
l’entree de chamarel annoncer a 250, c’est 500 par personne. on a pu voir le jardin pamplemousse, tortues terrestres, dune de couleurs chamarel, lac sacré, cap malheureux, port louis (moche et piege a souvenirs) puis le retour prevu a l’hotel a 17/18h bha c’est plutot 15h30/16h, le taxi est presser, roule vite et mal, bref c’est la fin de journée pour lui, et vous vous avez une mauvaise experience!
Alors oui ils sont gentils mais on devais quand meme visiter un temple qu’on a pas visiter…bref je ne mets que 3 etoiles uniquement pour les sorties en mer, qui sont top, le reste prenez une bagnole et debrouillez vous ce sera largement moins chers meme si cela vous parait peu!
reviews.author: david r

reviews.title: Highly recommend, very easy communication and excellent value for money x
reviews.text:
We have not long returned from a two week holiday in Mauritius staying in Ambre, Belle Mare.

We booked nearly all of the tours with Belle Mare Tours; I had investigated before arriving various tour agencies, but Belle Mare offered the best prices (clearly shown on their website) and reviews. We would have taken the 5 island tour with them had we not already booked via a chap on our beach at hotel. We did the South and North Island Tours (2 separate days), Mike was our driver and we requested him for all our tours – friendly, funny, and very knowledgeable. We also did the swim with dolphin’s tour - we did have to leave at 6am but it was definitely worth it – bucket list trip 😊 (however please note that if you intend to get in the water with the dolphins you need both a decent swimming ability and a generally good level of fitness to manage the repeated climbing back onto the boat). I made all the bookings over WhatsApp and they answered my messages promptly regardless of the day or time. Most of the tours ask for cash payment but it isn’t an issue as the drivers are happy to stop off at an ATM on the way – however make sure you use one that doesn’t charge a fee. We always used MCB but note that they have a daily maximum withdrawal of 10,000 rupees.

Would highly recommend Belle Mare Tours, very easy communication, reliable and best value for money.
reviews.author: Kirsty

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.text:
Met Belinda on the beach , she recommended the best day to go ( weather wise) chose the 8 hour trip which I highly recommend. We were a family of 2 adults and 2 kids age 9 and 5 . Our captain and co host was robin and Emily and they were both amazing and couldn’t do enough for us 😊 . The trip was was of our best ever , beautiful waterfalls , feeding monkeys , up close to dolphins and I mentioned I liked fishing before so they put a rod on the boat and we caught fish . Stopped off at a deserted lighthouse with stunning views , my son got to drive the boat which he loved , few Mauritian  coffee 😉 too . Finished off on a private beach eating fresh lobster / fish chicken , wine . Amazing day . Don’t miss out if your heading to Mauritius, go see Belinda 👌🏽👌🏽 

Thanks once again 😘😘
reviews.author: davidivins

reviews.title: Honest Mauritian
reviews.text: The guy his name Abdulnorani, I recommend him to arrange your trip. His prices compared to others fantastic. I enjoyed having him. Before you book a trip compare the prices and you will see that he is honest man. I love you Abdul.
reviews.author: Abdulaziz A

reviews.title: absoluter Straumstrand
reviews.text: Tolles Wasser, sehr gut zum Schnorcheln. Stundenlange Spaziergänge. An den Felsen und Steinen im Wasser aufpassen, da Seeigel sich dort festsetzen. Daher sind Badeschuhe für längeres Verweilen gut geeignet (teilweise auch für den Strand, da dort Korallen liegen).
reviews.author: Thorsten C

reviews.title: Nous recommandons vivement
reviews.text: Nous avons fait deux excursions avec Belle Mare Tours (une journée Nord de l´Île et ses marchés et une journée decouverte du Sud avec les dauphins le matin). Super communication avec les personnes de l´agence, prix imbattables (nous avons pris le temps de comparer les prix avec les chauffeurs locaux), excellent chauffeurs (sympathique, professionnels et ponctuels). Nous recommandons chaleureusement Belle Mare Tours. J et P :)
reviews.author: Ju M

reviews.title: Excursions
reviews.text:
Nous avons fait la traversée turquoise (visite des cinq îles) et le sud avec Belle mare Tours et avons été ravis.
Belle prestation, nous avons vraiment eu le temps de visiter, faire des photos, déjeuner sur la plage.
Nous avons souhaité visiter la rhumerie de Chamarel en plus et Mike nous a vraiment laissé tout le temps nécessaire. 
ils sont vraiment sympas, sérieux et ponctuels.
A recommander !
reviews.author: EandE59

reviews.title: Highly recommended for all of your needs in Mauritius!
reviews.text: This is the second time we’ve used Belle Mare Tours for our transfers and visit. We can not fault their service. They’ve been on time and we had a very smooth service with Mike. Geerja was great to communicate with and even attended the hotel for the payment as we did not have cash. Would highly recommend for all of your needs in Mauritius.
reviews.author: Phantom2036

reviews.title: BRILLIANT
reviews.text: We booked a scooter, a catamaran tour and the sea walking and all went great and the price was really good as well.  The scooter was brought to our hotel and when we dropped it off, one of the guys (sorry can't remember his name) took us back to our hotel.  Also when we did the sea walking Gurja (sorry if spelling isn't correct) was brilliant with us.  Everybody was so helpful.  When we got the Scooter Gurja gave us some tips on where to go etc.  Would definitely recommend Belle Mare Tours.
reviews.author: traveller245

reviews.text: Went dolphin swimming with them and everything from the communication, price, the transfer and the experience was seamless, easy and fantastic. Would definitely recommend.
reviews.author: Aashni T

reviews.title: Disappointing
reviews.text:
They were very helpful and quick to respond when arranging the swimming with dolphins tour, they quoted me a good price and when I requested that we needed only fins as it will be hard to swim alongside the dolphins without fins they said, do not worry as all gear is provided. 
I booked the tour a month before we were due to arrive in Mauritius. 
A few days before our tour, I contacted the company to confirm everything was okay for tour scheduled tour. We were told by the company that Nasser will taking care of us. However, when we arrived at the meeting point Nasser said that the price had increased and so we had to pay an additional 200 MUR (despite checking with the company a few days before), we paid it as this was very last minute and not much we could do to rearrange or contact the company to check this.
Then on our way to the boat, I asked when we will be trying on fins to check sizes and I was told fins are not provided only mask and and vest. This made it very hard to enjoy swimming with dolphins as they were too fast for us.
The experience itself was really unpleasant, the boat was overcrowded, with 13 other on our tour and it was all very rushed. Because there was too many people, it made it hard to go into the water without making too much noise which scared away the dolphins and to top it off, people jump in on top of you that someone on our boat got injured. The assistant of the boat was the only one with fins making it easy for him to catch up with the dolphins.
reviews.author: FM

reviews.title: Snabb och trevlig återkoppling!
reviews.text: Vi bokade en privat katamaran för vår bröllopsdag! Sex månaders baby och en femåring var med en heldag och vi hade det toppen!
reviews.author: Bibblobettan

reviews.title: Très belles experiences
reviews.text:
Nous avons fait 4 excursions  avec Bella mare Tours merciaux chauffeurs Mike pour le nord et Vikash pour le sud adorables merci pour la cueillette  des fruits Vikash. Nous avons fait les 7 cascades également un régal en rando et  un bon plan plongee sous marine sur une épave au nord .Ils m ont dépanné  le matin même en 1/4h  pour me proposer une excursion aux 5 iles que je devais faire avec un  autre tour opérateur  qui m à lâché   au dernier moment . Sérieux,  efficace et moins cher que par l hôtel  
Le patron est sérieux  et il facile de communiquer via WhatsApp.
reviews.author: Virginie R

reviews.title: Great Bell Mare Tours!!
reviews.text:
We visited Mauritius in april 2022 for two weeks and all our trips and transfers were done with Belle Mare Tours. The organizing and trips were perfect, exactly the type you need when you are in holiday and you want to relax and enjoy. Many thanks to the entire team and especially to Mike which was our driver and guide and it is a fabulous person.
Also I must mention that the price of the trips is half of what resorts were asking ,so apart for the high quality of the service, you have also good prices
reviews.author: Vacariu F

reviews.title: Superbes souvenirs et belles rencontres
reviews.text:
Nous avons fait 3 excursions avec Belle Mare
Tours, le Nord, nage avec les dauphins et
couleurs du Sud, et la traversée turquoise.
Nous avons demandé à avoir Mike
suite aux nombreux commentaires positifs le
concernant. Et nous sommes ravis. Mike est
une perle. Il est non seulement incollable sur
son île, ponctuel, souriant et avenant, mais
il est en plus très à l'écoute des desideratas
de tous. Notre plus jeune fils a eu une otite
la veille de la nage avec les dauphins et les
couleurs du sud, il est donc resté au chaud à
l'hôtel et nous nous sommes présenté à 2 au
lieu de 4 à l'excursion. Qu'à cela ne tienne.
Mike a proposé de scinder l'excursion en
deux, de refaire le Sud plus tard à 4, tarif
réajusté et sourire en prime. Et Geerja, qui
s'est pliée en quatre pour replanifier nos
excursions à la suite.
Merci pour ces superbes souvenirs.
reviews.author: Karine P

reviews.title: Sejour au nord de Maurice en avril 2022
reviews.text:
La visite du sud avec Mike, un véritable plaisir. Des renseignements et des réponses à toutes nos questions. Une visite de la journée sans se presser a notre rythme. A faire les yeux fermés sans se poser de questions. Bellemare tours n ayez aucunes hésitations. Un grand merci avec toute mon amitié à Mike, un super gars. 
Yves et Nathalie.
reviews.author: Yves B

reviews.title: Tolle Nordtour mit nettem Fahrer
reviews.text: Tolle Tour, der Fahrer hat einiges über die Geschicht erzählt was sehr interessant und informativ war. Auch alle meine Fragen konnte er beantworten. Sein englisch war sehr gut zu verstehen. Er hat sich auf meine Bedürfnisse eingestellt wie zb. in den Supermarkt fahren um Futter für die Strassenhunde zu kaufen oder zur Bank um Geld zu wechseln. Er war sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Die Tour war lohneswert.
reviews.author: Stephie

reviews.title: Reliable and trustworthy tour provider and value for money
reviews.text: Noo was amazing in helping us arrange a catamaran trip for lle aux curf and a le morne hike with a guide. Both of these tour days were very organised and value for money. We felt safe and we had an enjoyable experience. We also arranged an airport transfer through Belle Mare Tours which was very reasonably priced compared to our hotel.
reviews.author: Para

reviews.title: Unforgetable
reviews.text:
We had such an amazing experience in Mauritius thanks to Belle Mare Tours. We are so thankful for beautiful emotions and memories that we have now. Special thanks for Kadir, Mike, Robin and Sunil. They made our trip unforgetable. We definitely reccomend to address to this company as they will make your trip more comfortable and easier to explore. 
Mauritius is a pure gem and we will never forget our trip to this country.
reviews.author: Ahmet Kale

reviews.text:
Amazing crew! We have enjoyed the day trip Catamaran Cruise - lie Aux Cerfs
Prompt response via emails and quick communication via WhatsApp , all arranged so well even our transport from & to hotel. Best price in Belle Mare area, definitely worth going!
reviews.author: Veronika S

reviews.title: Excellent experience !
reviews.text: Me and my wife visited Mauritius for a one week.It was our Wedding anniversary trip and we expected to get some special experience. Reality was even much higher than our expectations.  Our impressions were largely due to the fact that from the time of our arrival at the airport until the moment of our departure, we were accompanied by a driver from BELLE MARE TOURS. This company helped us organize our trip from the first to the last day. Special thanks to the Cadea driver who accompanied us on most of our excursions. He is very courteous, knows everything about all the details of Mauritius very well (such as the history of Mauritius, its nature, the lifestyle of the locals) and gave us many useful tips during the tours. Highly recommend Belle Mare Tours for traveling around Mauritius.
reviews.author: Oleg

reviews.title: Excellent trip!
reviews.text:
We stayed one week in Mauritius. The trip we did with Bellmare Tours (Catamaran Trip Ile aux Cerfs) was magnificent. It was perfectly organised beginning  from the aranged taxi to the Atmosphäre on the boot! I would recommand it without a doubt (and i’m a critical Person ;)). 
You get value for the money you spent! 
Thanks again for the nice day!
reviews.author: Christophe d

reviews.title: Wonderful experience x2
reviews.text:
The bookings eere made from home, but already then there was great contact with Belle Mare, who swiftly and correctly responded to my emails. Thanks, Geerja! Price and quality are very well.
Be aware that you have to pay the agreed price in cash to the driver!

We decided to do the North tour with a private driver. Mike drove us around and really assisted in getting to know this part of Mauritius. He picked us us up in time and delivered us back to our hotel after 8hours. We enjoyed the fact that we could make our own choices: with two teenagers we went to Port Louis and were impressed by the Waterfront, we skipped the botanical garden and went to Labourdonnais in stead, which is an old colonnial building but very well preserved. Then to the real North with La Grande Baie and Cap Malheureux.

We were with 3 in the biggest suv of Belle Mare. It was big enough, but for a family of 4 with bigger teenagers, the car is too small, as my kids confirmed (18 and 15 years old). For our next tour a mini-van was booked that has enough space to comfortably go over the beautiful island of Mauritius with 4 people and a driver.

The mini-van was driven by Mirage, who was an excellent driver. Always ready, flexible and service minded. Great guy who also gave us a lot of interesting info. We combined the swimming with dolphines with the south-westtour. It turned out to be an excellent combination, although a long day. We were picked up at 6hr and brought back at 17hr. But we have seen beautiful green sights and saw dolphines with whom we had the opportunity to swim. But it is a bit overrated. Great to see them jump and swim, but the moment people jump in, at the time we were there there were 7 other boats there!, they swim to deeper waters below you, where we were able to see them. 
If you have enough time, I would advise to cut this tour in two: swim with dolphinnes and see the southwest separately, it is more relaxed and less tireing. The south west offers so much green nature, mountains and waterfalls (we saw 4) that it is almost a must to do! All tickets were included.

We had a great lunch that was included. You know, the place you wouldnot have chosen yourself but turned out to offer a nice meal with a starter, main course and desert. It was called 
Ebony Table d’Hôte in Vacoas and offered great service, friendly people and nice cold beer (was an extra).

In short, two great two tours organised by Belle Mare at a very reasonable price assisted by two great drivers of which Mirage stood out. Very recommendable!
reviews.author: Edo_Schilde_Belgie

reviews.title: Mauritius is an island paradise , the welcome is amazing
reviews.text: Excellent value and great service for trip from the airport to our hotel, the vehicle was immaculate and our driver Mike was great company.
reviews.author: Roger G

reviews.title: Dolphin swimming and Island Tour (2 Trips)
reviews.text: Amazing experience with a great company. 100% recommended Belle Mare Tours, great value an£ amazing experience thanks guys, made our holiday in beautiful Mauritius!
reviews.author: Leonie M

reviews.title: Raj to the rescue
reviews.text: We went on holiday not knowing where we would want to visit. A gentleman on the beach names Raj is a tour guide who puts together packages at affordable pricing to show you the tourist attractions of the island
reviews.author: Jacqueline N

reviews.title: Excellentes visites et excursions
reviews.text:
A l'Écoute, accompagnement parfait, transmission de la culture, accueillants, très sympathiques, compétents..Excellent tour !
Merci Satar,Noorani, Mike, Ram...... taxi à l'heure, promenades superbes, sorties en mer époustouflantes ! Rien à redire, qualité prix ! A recommander. 
David et Marie France
Groupe cgos
reviews.author: MF

reviews.title: Great day out
reviews.text:
We booked a catamaran tour including pick up from the hotel, 4000 MRU total for a couple. Taxi arrived on time and driver was very friendly. The day was very well organised and there were about 16 people on the boat, plenty of room to lay out In the sun and also a shaded area.

The crew were amazing and very funny, four young lads who also cooked the food and served drinks through the day, drink was flowing all day inclusive and the lunch was good, BBQ chicken, sausage and fish as well as salads.

We were lucky enough to see a dolphin on the way back and this topped the day off perfectly. Taxi driver was waiting upon our return without any waiting. The crew happily provided s life jacket for a few people who were not so confident however bring your own snorkel kit, usual issue around covid etc so they are not allowed to give them out.

Overall a brilliant day and great value for money.
reviews.author: Dannymc1985

reviews.title: Upsetting experience
reviews.text:
First of all the driver who drove us there was amazing really kind and helpful.

However before booking the swim with dolphins, I made sure to mention to them I wasn’t a very confident swimmer and asking if there were life jackets on board to help me (as I can swim when I have a life jacket ). The company got back to me and said yes I can still do it if I’m not very confident and there will be life jackets and a instructor who gets in the water with you to help. 
So I booked it.

Before we were about to get into the sea I asked for a life jacket. The man then replies saying you don’t need one you will be fine. I mention I’m not very confident. Again he was like there is no need I will be okay. 
So In the water I go with my boyfriend who has hold of me. Instantly I began to panic because my snorkel was filling up with water and I look up and I can’t see our boat near us because there was so many different companies also the instructor who was in the water with us was no where to be seen. If my boyfriend wasn’t helping me I don’t know what could of happened. I managed to get on to another companies boat who helped me and said I should of gone in with a life jacket. 
When getting back to our boat a man who was also here to swim with dolphins had a life jacket one which the man who said I shouldn’t have one gave to him. 

So overall it was a very disappointing experience because I knew If I just were to get given a life jacket none of this would of happened.
I wish I had booked through the other boats company which helped me when I panicked.
reviews.author: vicjenk_

reviews.title: Epic day out!!!
reviews.text: We had the best time so THANK YOU! The most perfect day out on the speed boat! Lots of snorkelling, getting soaked in the waterfall, jumping off the boat, exploring little islands, the most amazing bbq lunch and yummy local rum!! We had the best day out and we highly recommend you. We will spread the word!!

reviews.title: Très belle experience

reviews.title: Un salto in paradiso
reviews.text:
Affidandoci alle recensioni di internet abbiamo deciso di fare il tour dell’isola dei cervi con Belle Mare Tours.
Non potevamo chiedere di meglio! 
La nostra guida, Satar detto Jack, è stata meravigliosa, bravissimi anche i due skipper, due ragazzi giovani.
Eravamo un gruppo misto di inglesi, francesi e noi due Italiane e la comunicazione non è mai stata un problema.
Jack parla bene inglese, poche parole di italiano ma si fa intendere bene con cibo e bevande.
Pranzo in posto stupendo con barbecue buonissimo.
Consigliatissimo!!!

reviews.title: Very efficient service

reviews.text: Thanks for everyone who makes our tour special. Thanks mike nourani and everyone

reviews.title: Belle excursion dans le Sud de l’île Maurice
reviews.text: Magnifique journée à la découverte du Sud (Le cratère, Grand Bassin, les gorges de la Rivière Noire, Chamarel) guidé par Mike. La journée a été parfaite et Mike était prêt à adapter l’excursion à nos envies (pour nous pas de shopping, mais un déjeuner à Chamarel dans un restaurant mauricien : les Palmiers et arrêt à la rhumerie de Chamarel).

reviews.title: North Tour
reviews.text: First of all, let me start by saying that the driver really drove us to all the places we wanted to go. So props for that. But what we noticed is that he also drove us to places where we had the feeling that we needed to buy something so that the driver could get commission off of it. The mood in the beginning was very good, Sunil told us everything we needed to know about the island but when we didn't buy anything from the first 2 shops he drove us to, he became very moody and quiet. We asked to eat something small and he brought us to some place where the price of a soup was €15,00 (600 Rps). Very dissappointed to end our tour this way, it gave a bad feeling afterwards when we discussed the tour with my partner.

ownerResponse.text:
Dear Dies36,

We are regretfully for the bad experience that you occur with the driver. We tried our best to provide you with a wonderful experience during your excursion with us.

We have taken note of the point you mentioned that upset your mood and turn the whole trip into a disappointing one.

And we shall work upon it.

Regards
Belle Mare Tours Team

reviews.text: Great value high quality personal touch brilliant

reviews.title: Demander Mike!!!

Un autre chauffeur avait moins à coeur de nous faire découvrir l'ile ( a zappé certaines visites a port Louis car " trop d'embouteillage" ; déposé dans divers magasins attrappe touristes...).

reviews.title: Mycket bra arrangemang och snabb feedback
reviews.text: Bokande redan innan vår resa till Mauritius 4 utflykter med Belle Mare Tours. Otroligt snabba svar på mailkontakt och vi kunde anpassa utflykterna helt efter våra önskemål. Vi valde en dag på den norra delen, en dag, med delfinutflykt, på den södra delen, en tur till Port Louis och en till Casela Park (ledsen, Sunil, att du fick vänta länge på oss där. Rekommenderar minst 5 timmar för ett besök!) Mycket bra service av företaget och vi vill tacka vår chaufför/guide Sunil som alltid var punktlig och tipsade oss om lite saker utanför vår plan så att vi fick se många fina ställen. Han gav oss lagom med historia och information under våra utfärder och gjorde våra utflyktsdagar mycket givande! Nästa gång ska vi boka även flygplatstransfer med Belle Mare Tours.

reviews.title: Good trips by Belle Mare Tours

We had the most amazing 3 trips organized by the team of Belle Mare tours - very high quality, good price and professional. 
When i am next in Belle Mare - i am using them again!

reviews.title: Very Good service received!
reviews.text: Belle Mare Tours went out of their way to assist and provide great tours and travel suggestions! I would recommend them.

reviews.title: Laissez-vous guider, ils s'occupent de tout !
reviews.text:
Une agence qui organise pour vous vos visites sur place, en tout inclus !
Nous sommes passés par Belle Mare pour organiser notre semaine de vacances et de visites, et nous en sommes pleinement satisfaits.
Ils se sont occupés de tout, et se sont adaptés à nos désirs.
Ils viennent vous chercher le matin, vous ramène le soir, connaissent les places où il fait bon déjeuner le midi.
Les visites, et autres excursions sont totalement organisés.
Nous avons eu la chance d'avoir le même guide toute la semaine, guide fort sympathique et amoureux de son ile.
Un grand merci donc à Mike en particulier !
Et par dessus tout, les prix sont attractifs, et moins chers que ce qu'on peut trouver à l'hôtel, ou même via un taxi.
Une fois sur place, la communication d'effectue jour après jour via Whatsapp, afin d'ajuster en fonction des conditions météo par exemple.
Donc, autant vous dire que nous les recommandons chaudement !
Merci à toute l'équipe.
reviews.author: Antoni P

reviews.text:
An agency that organizes your local excursions for you, all-inclusive!

We used Belle Mare to organize our week-long vacation and sightseeing trip, and we were completely satisfied.

They took care of everything and adapted to our wishes.
They pick you up in the morning, drop you off in the evening, and know all the best places for lunch.
The tours and other excursions are fully organized.
We were lucky enough to have the same guide all week, a very friendly guide who loves his island.
A big thank you to Mike in particular!

And on top of everything, the prices are attractive and cheaper than what you can find at the hotel or even by taxi.
Once there, communication is maintained daily via WhatsApp, allowing for adjustments based on conditions like the weather.
So, needless to say, we highly recommend them!
Thank you to the whole team.

reviews.text: En janvier on a pris un taxi avec eux chauffeur très correct conduite souple et agréable pas comme certain taxi!  ballade en catamaran avec eux tarif correct comprenant le taxi ( de trou d eau a grand baie) la sortie et le repas et boissons 130 e pour un couple . On vous dit peut être à une prochaine fois en tout cas si nous revenons à l'île Maurice on reviendra vers vous et on refera les excursions mer qui sont vraiment inoubliables....
Alors n'hésitez pas ...

reviews.text:
Great price comparing to other companies. Great and safe driver Tader picked us up on time and told us some historical stories of the island and he knows everything about trees and plants. Such a fun time to be in the car with him. He makes sure he drives safely and we were not scared in the car.

Perfect service, quick responses, polite, great value for money.
Book with this agency when you go!
reviews.author: Isabella C

reviews.title: Great Catamaran and Les Sept Cascades/ Tamarin Falls trips
reviews.text:
We booked the Catamaran trip to Ile aux Cerfs the day before, by whatsapping the numbers listed on their website. They replied quickly, and confirmed that there was availability. The trip was great, and there were only 15 of us in total on the Catamaran so it was not crowded. Drinks were regularly offered by the friendly staff on the boat, including soft drinks, water, beer and 'Mauritian coffee' (rum and coke). The waves weren't at all choppy and it was very relaxing. We first went to the waterfall, and marvelled at the monkeys surrounding the rocks. We then went snorkelling in one of the best spots in the whole of Mauritius - the sheer quantity and diversity of the fish was amazing. The current was very low and even weaker swimmers would find it easy to swim here. We then went to Ile aux Cerfs, and spent approximately 2 hours exploring this island, with the whitest sand and brightest blue sea. There is a little craft market which was much more reasonable than the mainland, so a good opportunity to buy souvenirs here. There is also a bar for those who want to relax. The island itself is fun to explore, with woodland and an abundance of flora and fauna. We then met the Catamaran and sailed back to the mainland. 

The company also arranged for our pick-up and drop off to our hotel, at an additional charge, and the driver was also really friendly. This trip was much more reasonably priced in comparison to other Catamaran trips. We were so impressed with the trip that we decided to go with Belle Mare for a hike of Les Sept Cascades/ Tamarin Falls. This walk was harder than expected and our legs were a little sore the next day (signs of a good workout), because of a little clambering. It was very safe, and there were always robust trees to hold on to to aid our descent. Going down was definitely harder than climbing up, but definitely doable and really enjoyable. I would not recommend this for anyone with weak knees or ankles, however. Once again, both our driver and guide were really friendly and fun and it was great that we were given a private guide and that this was not within a group, as we were able to go at our own pace and really enjoy the walk. The waterfalls themselves are really spectacular and photos we had seen prior did not do them justice at all. Really stunning. This was a fun and energetic trip which we really enjoyed, and re-ignited my love of hiking.
reviews.author: Jess C

Dear Jellakings,

reviews.title: Great tours
reviews.text:
We booked the South Tour and hiking Le Morne, we couldn't be happier!
Everything from booking to pick up went smoothly and the communication was easy. The prices for the tours are much better than the ones you get in the hotels.
The south tour is a must for everyone visiting Mauritius! Hiking Le Morne is challenging and some people just gave up in the middle, but it's absolutely worth the sweat, as the views are amazing.
We'd like to thank our driver Sunil - he was always right on time, knowledgeable and with a great sense of humor! He explained us everything from the history of the island to specific information for the places we've been to, so this made the ride really enjoyable.

reviews.title: Excellent bespoke tour
reviews.text: We felt very fortunate to find Belle Mare tours via Tripadvisor. They were quick to respond to my online enquiry then prompt to get back to me with a competitive quote (much cheaper than hotel!). Mr Mansoor arrived on time and in a great car. We particularly wanted to go to La Vanille Crocodile Park and then to a market. This is exactly what Mr Mansoor did. It was refreshing to have an excellent English speaking guide who also didn’t deviate from the route. He suggested a lovely cliff top spot for our picnic lunch and gave us some local info about life in Mauritius. On the way back, he bought us some fresh Indian snacks from a local shop and refused to take any money for them. Such a treat! We had a wonderful day and would highly recommend this company and in particular Mr  Mansoor as your driver.
reviews.author: Emmaj432

reviews.title: Great tours
reviews.text: Tour guides are very knowledgeable,friendly and know the best places to visit. They give you ample time when visiting places and ensure that you are happy and safe.
reviews.author: sanjirajdew

reviews.text:
Really amazing offer: 5 Islands via speedboat.
Very lovely crew and a once in a lifetime event, eventhough I'd go again, if I ever get the chance.
reviews.author: Jennifer Westphal

reviews.title: super ballades
reviews.text: les personnes qui nous prenaient en charge ont été cool, charmant, patient....et toujours bienveillants

reviews.text: Alright
reviews.originalText: Très bien
